1000608010.english: Hey~! &n Hey! Captain! The 83rd Expedition Recruitment is complete! Shall we go soon?!
1000608010.korean: 어이~!&n어이! 캡틴! 83차 탐험대 모집 끝났어! 슬슬 출발할까?!

1000608012.english: Lord. Why is the master in a place like that?!

1000608013.english: Huh? What the.... I can't come to my senses after seeing Captain...
1000608013.korean: 엥? 뭐야.... 캡틴 보더니 정신을 못 차리네...

1000608014.english: Didn't you say the master was here?! &n I'll go too...
1000608014.korean: 주인님이 계신다는 말은 없었지 않습니까?!&n저도... 가겠사옵니다.

1000608015.english: Hehe, what's up? You suddenly changed your mind? &n Well, the more companions the better. Congratulations on joining the expedition.
1000608015.korean: 헤헤 뭐야? 갑자기 생각이 바뀌었어?&n뭐, 동료는 많을수록 좋지. 탐험대 가입을 축하해.

1000608016.english: With the master here, I couldn't possibly miss out, right? I'm sure he's eating only modest meals. Now that I'm here...
1000608016.korean: 주인님이 계시는데 제가 빠질 수야 없지 않겠습니까. &n보나 마나 끼니도 변변찮은 걸로 드시고 계실 텐데. 제가 왔으니 이제...

1000608018.english: Look at that. The master's childish excitement. How can he be so... adorable...
1000608018.korean: 저기 좀 보세요. 주인님의 어린애처럼 들뜬 모습.&n어찌 저렇게... 사랑스러울까...

1000608019.english: Hmm. You like Captain that much too? Tsk... This is a bit...
1000608019.korean: 흠. 너도 캡틴이 그렇게 좋아? 칫... 이건 좀 그런데...

1000608020.english: But you know, if you like the Captain so much, why don't you get close to him?
1000608020.korean: 그런데 말이야. 당신은 캡틴을 그렇게 좋아하면서, 왜 캡틴한테 가까이 안 가?

1000608021.english: Hehehe... The more you love someone... the more embarrassed you become, that's the heart of a woman.
1000608021.korean: 후훗... 사모할수록... 더욱 부끄러워지는 것이 여자의 마음이옵니다.

1000608022.english: Hehehe. Right. There are many ways to like someone. &n Well. Okay. Let's go together! Take care! Chef!
1000608022.korean: 히히. 그래. 사람을 좋아하는 데는 여러 가지 방식이 있는 법이지. &n뭐. 알았어. 같이 출발하자고! 잘 부탁해! 요리사!

1000608023.english: Me too... Ah... Master... Please wait a moment!
1000608023.korean: 저 역시... 아... 주인님... 조금만 기다리시옵소서!

1000608024.english: Everyone worked hard to find the treasure!!

1000608025.english: I really liked the captain you guys saw. If you ever feel like going on an adventure, just ask me. I'm New Triaina, the expedition leader. Remember that.
1000608025.korean: 대원들 본 대장은 정말 맘에 들었어. 혹시 모험이 생각나면 날 찾으면 돼&n나는 탐험대장 뉴 트리아이나. 기억해둬.

1000608026.english: Okay! New Triaina too. Good work! &n Moreover, Sowan, you've been just loitering around... Aren't you going to talk to the Commander?
1000608026.korean: 오케이! 뉴 트리아이나도. 수고했어!&n그보다 소완 씨, 계속 서성이기만 하던데... 사령관한테 말은 안 거는 거야?

1000608027.english: Phew... Mr. Spriggan? &n I'm starting to find you annoying. Would you mind if I just disappear from around here?
1000608027.korean: 휴우... 스프리건 씨?&n점점... 그대가 성가시게 느껴지는군요. 근처에서 사라져 주시면 감사하겠사옵니다만?

1000608028.english: Eek...! No! You have to cheer up! Spriggan is a reporter who spreads the truth. &n Ms. Sowan... Are you planning to infringe on her right to know?
1000608028.korean: 히익...! 안 돼! 힘내야 해! 스프리건은 진실을 전파하는 리포터야.&n소완 씨야말로... 알 권리를 침해할 생각이야?

1000608029.english: Hmm... &n I don't understand why all those who call themselves reporters take their lives so lightly.
1000608029.korean: 흐음... &n어찌하여 기자를 자칭하는 분들은 하나같이 그 목숨을 가볍게 여기시는지... 알 수가 없사옵니다.

1000608030.english: Hehe... That... Really? &n Wait a minute. Mr. Sowan? Are you kidding? Eek! Knife! Why are you holding a knife? It's not time to cook yet!
1000608030.korean: 헤헤... 그... 그러게? &n잠깐만. 소완 씨? 농담이지? 히익! 칼! 칼은 왜 드는 거야? 아직 요리할 때아니잖아!

1000608032.english: Huh? Miss Lilith? Anyway, welcome! Here, stop Sowan... Huh?
1000608032.korean: 응? 리리스 씨? 어쨌든 잘 왔어! 여기 소완 씨 좀 말려... 응?

1000608033.english: Ah, Miss Sowan, you're here. Hehehe...
1000608033.korean: 아아. 소완 양, 여기 계셨군요. 후후후...

1000608034.english: The potion you gave me was truly amazing. It didn't even hypnotize me... I fell asleep as soon as I took it... Do you happen to know anything about this?
1000608034.korean: 당신이 준 약은 정말로 신기하더군요. 최면은커녕... 마시자마자 잠이 들던데...&n혹시 여기에 대해서 아는 게 있나요?

1000608035.english: Well, I see. Haha. That's strange... &n I guess I gave you the sleeping pills by mistake. Haha... That's a common occurrence.
1000608035.korean: 글쎄옵니다? 후후. 이상하기도 하지...&n혹시 제가 착각해 수면제를 드렸나 보옵니다. 후후... 흔한 일이지요.

1000608037.english: Miss Spriggan? Come out. You'll get swept away for nothing... &n ... And leave that camera here.
1000608037.korean: 스프리건 양? 나오세요. 괜히 휩쓸릴 테니...&n... 그리고 그 카메라는 여기 두고 가시고요.

1000608038.english: Ka, why the camera!!? Oh, anyway, I survived! Thank you!!
1000608038.korean: 카, 카메라는 왜!!? 어, 어쨌든 살았어! 땡큐!!

1000608039.english: I'll leave the camera here. Take care! Have a good time, you two!
1000608039.korean: 카메라는 여기 두고 갈게요. 잘 있어요!&n두 분 좋은 시간 되세요!

1000608040.english: ...Okay, now let me explain what happened.
1000608040.korean: ... 자, 이제 어떻게 된 건지 설명해 보실까?

1000608041.english: Haha... What are you talking about... I don't know?
1000608041.korean: 호호... 무슨 말씀이신지... 저로선 알 수가 없사옵니다만?

1000608042.english: You, you idiot, foolishly gave yourself a sleeping pill to Miss Audrey. Do you have any more explanation?
1000608042.korean: 멍청한 당신이 멍청하게 스스로 오드리 양께 수면제를 먹이신 것이지요.&n설명할 게 더 있사옵니까?

1000608043.english: ...So. What you gave me was a sleeping pill?

1000608044.english: Haha. Of course. How dare you try to seduce your master while wearing a swimsuit? Don't you feel sorry for your master's eyes?
1000608044.korean: 후후. 당연하옵니다. 감히 그대 따위가 수영복을 입고 주인님을 유혹하려고&n하셨습니까? 주인님의 눈이 불쌍하지 않사옵니까?

1000608045.english: Ahh... I love you so much. &n And you're still alive...
1000608045.korean: 아아... 난 네가 너무 좋아.&n아직 살아 있어서...

1000608046.english: Because I can kill you. &n Come on, I'll give you time to resist. Get up now!
1000608046.korean: 죽일 수 있으니까. &n자, 저항할 시간은 주지. 당장 일어나!

1000608047.english: Oh my, it's scary. &n But... Have you forgotten anything?
1000608047.korean: 어머나 무서워라.&n그런데 말이죠... 그대, 혹시 잊은 게 없사옵니까?

1000608048.english: For example... the person you have imprisoned...
1000608048.korean: 예를 들어... 그대가 감금해 놓은 사람이라든가...

1000608049.english: Lise? I've already locked that stalker up. I told the dog to keep him safe...
1000608049.korean: 리제? 그 스토커는 이미 내가 가둬놨어. &n강아지에게 확실하게 지키라고 해뒀으니...

1000608050.english: You pest!! How dare you... interfere with my love with my master? I won't forgive you... I'll cut you down!!! A thousand times! Ten thousand times!
1000608050.korean: 이 해충!! 감히... 주인님과 내 사랑을 방해해?&n용서 못 해... 자르겠어!!! 천 번! 만 번 자르겠어!

1000608053.english: Hehe... Your mistake was entrusting such an important task to a sister who can easily fall for a meat pie. &n Miss Lise? Are you feeling well?
1000608053.korean: 후후... 당신 실수는 고기 파이 하나에 쉽게 넘어가는 자매에게 중요한 일을 맡긴 거죠.&n리제 양? 몸은 괜찮으신가요?

1000608054.english: Get out of the way! Sowan! You pest! I'll kill you!!!
1000608054.korean: 넌 비켜있어! 소완! 이 해충! 죽여버릴 거야!!!

1000608055.english: How low does this stalker's intelligence go? Don't you get it? You're being fooled by Sowan!
1000608055.korean: 이 스토커의 지능은 어디까지 떨어지는 거지?&n모르겠어? 넌 소완한테 속고 있다고!

1000608056.english: Shut up! You put Audrey to sleep and stopped me from wearing a swimsuit! &n Pest! You?! Speak up!
1000608056.korean: 닥쳐! 오드리를 재워서 내가 수영복 입는 걸 말린 것도! &n해충! 너지?! 말해!

1000608057.english: Stalker! What are we going to do then? &n Should we try it here?
1000608057.korean: 스토커! 그렇다면 어쩔 건데?&n여기서 한 번 해볼까?

1000608058.english: This pest... I'm going to kill it... &n I'm going to cut it... I'm going to cut it until it's out of sight!
1000608058.korean: 이 해충... 죽일 거야... &n잘라서... 모습이 안 보일 때까지 잘라 버릴 거야!

1000608059.english: Ah... ah... why is it that at times like this... my heart is in sync with that stalker? Huh? Stalker? Tell me!
1000608059.korean: 아... 아아... 어째서 이럴 때... 저 스토커랑 내 마음이 맞는 걸까?&n응? 스토커? 말해 봐!

1000608060.english: ...You... &n you were really after me just now, weren't you?

1000608061.english: This is the last mercy. Stalker. Even if I get rid of you, my master will be sad... Next is the head. If you don't disappear now... That bad head will disappear too.
1000608061.korean: 마지막 자비야. 스토커. 아무리 너라도 없애면 주인님께서 슬퍼하실 테니...&n다음엔 머리야. 지금 사라지지 않으면... 그 나쁜 머리도 없어질 테지.

1000608062.english: ... Hehe... Hehehe. I knew it. This pest....
1000608062.korean: ... 히... 히히히. 그럴 줄 알았어. 이 해충....

1000608063.english: Oh my... Coworkers fighting amongst themselves... How pathetic.

1000608064.english: Then, so that you two can have some time... I guess the intruder should go away. Then, I'll take my leave...
1000608064.korean: 그럼 두 분의 시간을 가질 수 있게... 방해꾼은 사라져야겠군요.&n그럼 전 이만...

1000608066.english: Pests... You have to deal with me first, right? Huh? Huh? Huh? Huh? Huh? Huh? Huh? Huh? Huh?
1000608066.korean: 해충... 넌 나랑 먼저 해결해야지?&n응? 응? 응? 응? 응? 응? 응? 응? 응?

1000608067.english: S, Spriggan makes an appropriate appearance!

1000608068.english: Commander? Over here! Stop these guys!
1000608068.korean: 사령관 님? 여기예요! 얘네들 좀 말려줘요.

1000608070.english: How did the master get here...?

1000608071.english: - Phew... Fortunately, it seems it's not too late. And there are no injuries...
1000608071.korean: - 후... 다행히도 늦지 않은 것 같다. 부상자도 없고...

1000608072.english: - What on earth are these kids fighting about? Is that it?
1000608072.korean: - 이 아이들은... 대체 무슨 일로 싸우고 있는 거지?&n역시... 그건가?

1000608073.english: Yes. Yes? You want me to say it in front of them? I can't! I can't! I'll leave the camera there, so you can check the details yourself!
1000608073.korean: 네. 네? 얘들 앞에서 말하라고요? 못해요! 못해!&n거기 카메라 두고 갈 테니까, 자세한 건 직접 확인해보세요!

1000608074.english: I'm off now! I have another shoot waiting for me. &n , a reporter who tells the truth!! I'm leaving now!~!
1000608074.korean: 난 이만! 다른 촬영이 기다리고 있어서 말야.&n지, 진실을 전하는 리포터!! 이만 떠납니다!~!

1000608075.english: - Spriggan handed me the camera and memory card and ran towards the beach. If we check the memory card, we'll be able to find the cause of this commotion.
1000608075.korean: - 스프리건은 카메라와 메모리를 내게 쥐여주고, 해변 쪽으로 달려갔다.&n메모리를 확인해 보면, 이 소동의 원인을 찾을 수 있겠지.

1000608076.english: Master?! Oh, no!! That's... well. It has a bad release on it! &n You mustn't look at it! Please!!!
1000608076.korean: 주인님?! 아, 안 돼요!! 그건... 그러니까. 나쁜 리리스가 찍혀 있어요! &n절대로 보시면 안 돼요! 제발!!!

1000608077.english: ...Master? Would you please give that to me?

1000608078.english: That memory contains inappropriate content. If the pure master sees it, it will be hurtful... I will burn it and destroy it.
1000608078.korean: 그 메모리에는 부적절한 내용이 담겨 있사옵니다.&n순수하신 주인님께서 보시면 상처를 입으실... 소첩이 태워 없애 버리겠나이다.

1000608080.english: Hey, please stop, Master!!! No! No!
1000608080.korean: 머, 멈춰 주세요 주인님!!! 안돼요! 안돼!

1000608081.english: - Seeing Sowan and Lilith panicking like that, it seems like there must be something incredibly dangerous in the memory.
1000608081.korean: - 소완과 리리스가 저렇게 당황하는 걸 보아하니,&n메모리엔 정말 위험하기 짝이 없는 내용이 들어있을 것 같다.

1000608082.english: - I firmly stopped Sowan and Lilith. I checked the memory.
1000608082.korean: - 나는 소완과 리리스를 단호하게 제지하고. 메모리를 확인했다.

1000608083.english: - The tiny memory chip had a cute label sticker on it, and it had Spriggan's handwriting on it...
1000608083.korean: - 자그마한 메모리 칩엔 귀여운 분류 스티커가 붙어있었고,&n거기엔 스프리건의 자필로...

1000608084.english: - Damn it... I saw something I shouldn't have. Why did Spriggan give me this?
1000608084.korean: - 제길... 보면 안 되는 걸 봐 버렸다.&n스프리건은 내게 왜 이런 걸 준 걸까?

1000608085.english: ... Lord, master? What did you see?

1000608086.english: - Spriggan must have transmitted the memory incorrectly. That kid... always makes a lot of mistakes.
1000608086.korean: - 스프리건이 메모리를 잘못 전달해준 것이겠지.&n그 아이... 늘 실수가 많으니까.

1000608087.english: - I looked around quickly, but Spriggan was nowhere to be seen, as if he had gone far away.
1000608087.korean: - 급하게 주위를 둘러봤지만, 스프리건은 멀리 떠나버린 건지 보이지 않았다.

1000608088.english: Master?! &n Don't misunderstand. That cook bitch is the one who set it all up!
1000608088.korean: 주인님?!&n오해하시면 안 돼요. 모든 건 저 요리사 년이 꾸민 일이에요!

1000608089.english: "It's unfair! Master! I just... tried to persuade Miss Audrey... and calm my sister, who was a little upset...
1000608089.korean: 억울하옵니다! 주인님! 전 그저...&n오드리 양을 설득하기 위해서... 그리고 조금 머리가 뜨거워진 자매를 진정시키려고...

1000608090.english: Two bickering maids. I hold a misplaced memory chip...
1000608090.korean: - 투닥거리는 두 명의 메이드. 내 손에는 잘못 전달된 메모리 칩...

1000608091.english: - Well... let's say it was the beginning of a fight. Their eyes met, or something like that... It could have been something like that. Sowan might have been joking around, or Lilith might have started a fight.
1000608091.korean: - 뭐... 싸움의 발단이라 해 봐야. 눈이 마주쳤다든가, 대충... 그런 내용이겠지.&n소완이 가벼운 장난을 쳤거나 리리스가 시비를 걸었을 수도 있고.

1000608092.english: - I don't know what happened, but I can't let these two continue fighting like this.
1000608092.korean: - 어떻게 된 일인지는 모르겠지만, 두 사람이 이렇게 계속 다투게 둘 순 없다.

1000608093.english: - I racked my brain and decided to rewrite the method I used to calm May and Night Angel. It should work for both of them...
1000608093.korean: - 나는 머리를 굴려 메이와, 나이트 앤젤을 진정시켰던 방법을 다시 써 보기로 했다.&n이 둘에게도 통해야 할 텐데...

1000608094.english: - If May and Night Angel see this, they'll be in real trouble... but there's nothing they can do.
1000608094.korean: - 메이와 나이트 앤젤이 이걸 보면 정말 큰일 나겠지만... 어쩔 수 없지.

1000608095.english: Lord... Master...? Are you serious? Lilith... I could die of happiness...
1000608095.korean: 주... 주인님...? 정말이신가요? 리리스... 행복해서 죽어 버릴 지도...

1000608096.english: You. I warned you that if you laughed at my master, I would kill you, didn't I? Do you really want to die?
1000608096.korean: 너. 내가 주인님 보고 웃으면 죽여버린다고 경고했었지? &n정말 죽고 싶은 거야?

1000608097.english: I'm going to say this. Stalker! &n You're the one who should disappear 10 meters away from the master!
1000608097.korean: 내가 할 소리야. 스토커! &n너야말로 주인님 근처 10미터 바깥으로 사라져!

1000608098.english: My swimsuit nemesis... I'll cut you to shreds too.
1000608098.korean: 내 수영복의 원수... 너도 갈기갈기 잘라내 버릴 거야.

1000608099.english: Reconciliation seemed difficult. It seemed like the swimsuit was the cause of the fight... What on earth could a swimsuit do to make things so heated?
1000608099.korean: - 화해는 힘들어 보였다. 수영복이 싸움의 원인이 된 것 같긴 한데...&n수영복이 대체 뭐라고 이렇게까지 열을 올리는지...

1000608100.english: - Anyway, we can't have you come all the way here and spend your vacation fighting with each other.
1000608100.korean: - 아무튼, 여기까지 와서 서로 다투면서 휴가를 보내게 할 순 없다.

1000608101.english: But... I'm the only one without a swimsuit. Master, are you embarrassed that I don't fit in at the beach?
1000608101.korean: 그렇지만... 저만 수영복이 없어요. 주인님은 바닷가에서 어울리지 않는 제가 부끄러우시죠?

1000608102.english: You're not the only one missing! Why don't you shut up? Before I poke a hole in your windpipe and force you to stop talking!
1000608102.korean: 너만 없는 거 아냐! 입 좀 다물지?&n기도에 구멍을 내서 강제로 말을 못 하게 만들기 전에!

1000608103.english: Even without a swimsuit, there are plenty of ways to enjoy a beach vacation. The question is whether my body can handle the sun...
1000608103.korean: - 수영복이 없어도, 해변에서 휴가를 즐길 수 있는 방법은 많다.&n내 몸이 일광욕을 버틸 수 있을지가 관건이지만...

1000608105.english: At the beach, just the two of you, Master and I...?

1000608107.english: ...The master needs some cool shade, am I right?
1000608107.korean: ... 주인님께는 시원한 그늘이 필요해요. 제 말이 맞죠?

1000608108.english: ...Something to block the sun.... Hehehe! Yes~. I know... It's really close.
1000608108.korean: ... 햇볕을 가릴만한 게.... 힛힛힛!&n네~. 제가 알고 있어요... 정말 가까운 곳에 있어요.

1000608109.english: Pest! I'll meet Daphne for a moment, so stand still! &n Do not approach. This is your final warning.
1000608109.korean: 해충! 잠깐 다프네를 만나고 올테니, 거기에 가만히 서있어!&n접근하지 마. 이게 마지막 경고야.

1000608110.english: - Phew... Next up... Lilith and Sowan are left... If I just have to reconcile these two...
1000608110.korean: - 휴우... 다음은... 리리스와 소완이 남았군... 이 둘만 화해시키려면....

1000608113.korean: 오드리 양...? 제가 설명할 수 있어요.

1000608114.english: Miss Lilith! What the heck is that car? I woke up from a good night's sleep and my body feels so light!
1000608114.korean: 리리스양! 대체 그 차는 뭐죠?&n푹 자고 깨어났더니 몸이 정말 가뿐해요!

1000608116.english: You...drank that and already woke up?

1000608117.english: Ah! Inspiration is back! And fashion! Of course, you can look forward to Miss Lilith' swimsuit. I'll make the best swimsuit while keeping Miss Lilith's orders to the best of my ability.
1000608117.korean: 아! 인스퍼레이션이 되살아 났어! 패션도! 물론 리리스 양의 수영복은 기대하셔도 좋아요.&n제가 리리스 양의 주문을 최대한 지키면서 최고의 스윔 수트를 만들어 드리죠.

1000608118.english: Anyway, Miss Lilith, you're welcome to come to my boutique anytime. &n Miss Lilith, you're always welcome! You're my Spirit Sister!
1000608118.korean: 아무튼, 리리스 양은 언제든지 제 부티크로 찾아와도 좋아요. &n릴리스 양이라면 언제든 웰컴! 나의 스피릿 시스터니까!

1000608120.english: Hohoho! Miss Lilith's consideration is really... &n Everything went well. It went very well!
1000608120.korean: 후훗! 리리스 양의 배려심은 정말...&n모두 잘 됐어요. 아주 잘 되었사옵니다!

1000608123.english: - Sowan, praising Lilith, was shining brightly in the sunlight.
1000608123.korean: - 리리스를 칭찬하는 소완은. 햇살을 받아 밝게 빛나고 있었다.

1000608124.english: - Perhaps, since arriving in Orca, Sowan has been working hard in his own way.
1000608124.korean: - 아마 오르카에 도착한 뒤로, 소완 나름대로 열심히 노력하고 있는 것이겠지.

1000608125.english: Hehe... It was just a minor quarrel. I just want to continue to have a good relationship with Lilith...
1000608125.korean: 후후... 그저 사소한 말다툼이었을 뿐이옵니다.&n리리스양과는 앞으로도 좋은 관계로 지내고 싶을 뿐...

1000608126.english: Yes, Master. This incident... made me want to know Sowan better.
1000608126.korean: 네, 주인님. 이번 일로... 소완을 좀 더 알고 싶어졌어요.

1000608127.english: - Sowan and Lilith looked at each other and smiled brightly.
1000608127.korean: - 소완과 리리스는 서로 마주 보며 환하게 웃었다.

1000608128.english: - My back feels a bit numb... but it's probably just my imagination. Of course... it's probably just my imagination.
1000608128.korean: - 어쩐지 등이 시린 느낌이지만... 기분 탓일 거다. 아무렴... 기분 탓이겠지.

1000608130.english: Orca is longing!! Orca at twelve o'clock! &n The first broadcast starts off refreshingly with Spriggan.
1000608130.korean: 오르카는 갈망한다!! 열두 시 내 오르카!&n그 첫 방송 스프리건과 함께 상큼하게 시작합니다.

1000608131.english: It's a hot summer, and at the whim of the Commander, Orca's Bioroids get an unexpected vacation.
1000608131.korean: 때는 무더운 여름,&n사령관의 변덕으로 오르카의 바이오로이드들은 뜻하지 않은 휴가를 얻습니다.

1000608132.english: So, an adventure begins on a tropical island, and an exploration of the vault begins in the name of treasure hunting.
1000608132.korean: 그리하여 남국의 섬에서 모험과, 트레저 헌팅이라는 명목으로 금고 탐험이 시작되는데요.

1000608133.english: However, we recently received information that the Bioroids are unable to leave the vault for various reasons! Spriggan, representing Orca, has urgently arrived at the scene to report.
1000608133.korean: 하지만 최근 바이오로이드들이 이런저런 이유로 금고를 떠나지 못하고 있다는 정보를 입수!&n스프리건이 오르카를 대표해 급히 현장 취재 나왔습니다.

1000608134.english: My shoulders feel heavy as I think of the Orca sisters who are just waiting for Spriggan's broadcast! &n New main reporter Spriggan, please come out!
1000608134.korean: 스프리건의 방송만 기다리고 계실 오르카의 자매들을 생각하니 어깨가 무겁군요!&n신입 메인 리포터 스프리건 나와주세요!

1000608135.english: Yes! This is reporter Spriggan! &n Ahem. Enough with the small talk, let's get started with the interview.
1000608135.korean: 네! 리포터 스프리건입니다!&n흠흠. 잡설은 여기까지 해두고, 본격적으로 인터뷰 시작하겠습니다.

1000608136.english: First of all, the person in charge of the site? Please come out!

1000608137.english: Huh? Commander? Oh, it'll just take a moment~.

1000608138.english: Hmm? Why? The Orca commander is having trouble covering the story right now. Something smells fishy!
1000608138.korean: 으음? 왜죠? 현재 오르카의 사령관님이 취재를 어려워하고 계십니다.&n뭔가 심상찮은 냄새가 나는군요!

1000608139.english: Sir, as I requested earlier, I'd like to conduct a search of the safe. Is that alright?
1000608139.korean: 책임자님? 앞서 요청드린 대로, 금고 취재를 진행하려는데, 괜찮을까요?

1000608140.english: - Spriggan held the microphone up to me with a smug expression. &n Looking at Spriggan's playful face, I started to feel a little worried.
1000608140.korean: - 스프리건은 의기양양한 표정을 한 채 내게 마이크를 들이댔다.&n스프리건의 장난기 가득한 얼굴을 보고 있자니 괜한 걱정이 든다.

1000608141.english: - Currently, the vault only allows entry to those who request entry with a legitimate reason. In the case of Spriggan, the purpose is to gather video footage for those who remain in Orca.
1000608141.korean: - 현재 금고는 정당한 사유를 가지고 출입을 요청하는 인원들에 한해서 입장을 허가하고 있다.&n스프리건의 경우, 오르카에 잔류한 인원들을 위한 영상 취재가 목적.

1000608142.english: - ... However, I am concerned about whether Spriggan can film only the facts without distortion.
1000608142.korean: - ... 다만, 스프리건이 왜곡 없이 사실만을 촬영할 수 있는지 걱정된다.

1000608143.english: - Well... Anyway, a promise is a promise, so I guess I should allow filming.
1000608143.korean: - 뭐... 어찌 됐든 약속은 약속이니, 촬영을 허락해야겠지.

1000608144.english: Yes! Thank you for your cooperation!

1000608145.english: Spriggan, let's proceed with the investigation into Leoboros's vault! But...

1000608146.english: Oh, my. Will it be okay? Rumor has it that the AGSs are still operating... &n Will it be dangerous to report? If the person in charge accompanies me...will it be okay?
1000608146.korean: 어휴. 괜찮으려나? 소문으로는 아직도 AGS들이 작동하고 있다던데...&n취재를 하는데 혹시 위험하진 않을까요? 책임자가 동행하면... 괜찮을 지도?

1000608147.english: This time, he twists his body and looks at me with a sly gaze. Even so, his body faithfully holds the microphone. Are you asking me to be your bodyguard?
1000608147.korean: - 이번에는 몸을 꼬아가며 은근한 눈빛으로 나를 바라본다. &n그러면서도 몸은 충실히 마이크를 들이댄다. 내게 보디가드를 요청하는 건가?

1000608148.english: - ...Before we get any more tired, let's attach one of the people who wants to enter the vault to Spriggan.
1000608148.korean: - ... 더 피곤해지기 전에, 금고 출입을 희망하는 인원 중 한 명을 스프리건에게 붙여주자.

1000608149.english: - At that moment, the most capable bodyguard from the list, Angel's safe, caught my eye.
1000608149.korean: - 때마침 리스트에서 앙헬의 금고 한정으로 가장 유능한 보디가드가 눈에 띄었다.

1000608152.english: Your Majesty, Commander. Are you looking for me?

1000608155.english: It's difficult. Your Majesty, my destination is the deepest part of the vault. Dark and deep... a place where no warrior can guarantee safety.
1000608155.korean: 곤란합니다. 각하, 제 목적지는 금고의 가장 깊은 곳입니다.&n어둡고 깊은... 그 어떤 전사도 안전을 장담할 수 없는 곳입니다.

1000608156.english: - If it's the deepest part of the vault. Obviously...

1000608157.english: Yes, where my brother's remains were buried... Fortunately, the skeleton remained, so it seemed possible to move it somehow...
1000608157.korean: 그렇습니다. 제 형제의 잔해가 묻힌 곳...&n다행히도 골조는 남아 있어서 어떻게든 움직일 수는 있어 보였습니다만...

1000608158.english: There was a weak signal coming from there, so I plan to go check it out.
1000608158.korean: 그곳에서 미약한 신호가 흘러나왔기에, 확인차 다녀올 계획입니다.

1000608159.english: Haha. I wouldn't be greedy for food, would I? Your Excellency, your astute commander.
1000608159.korean: 하하. 제가 음식 따위를 탐할 리 없지 않겠습니까? 영민하신 사령관 각하.

1000608160.english: - ... Roc has been giving off a strange vibe ever since he was dragged away by Fortune and the Doctor a while ago. If I had to describe it, I'd say he feels... closer to the Doctor.
1000608160.korean: - ... 로크는 얼마 전 포츈과 닥터에게 끌려간 이후로, 뭔가 묘한 분위기를 풍긴다.&n굳이 표현하자면 닥터 쪽에... 가까운 느낌이라고 해야겠다.

1000608161.english: Your majesty's mouth is as solid as gold. I cannot disobey a command. I will obey.
1000608161.korean: 귀하신 분의 입은 금과 같지요. 나온 명령을 거스를 수는 없는 법.&n따르겠습니다.

1000608162.english: Wow! What a cool, black robot. Could you give me a quick interview?
1000608162.korean: 오오! 정말 검고 멋진 로봇이네요. 잠깐 저와 인터뷰를...

1000608164.english: Hmm... In the past, Angel Duke always praised the reporters who tried to interview him in the same way. &n Please be polite so that he can remain quiet forever...
1000608164.korean: 흐음... 과거 앙헬 공은 자기를 취재하려 하는 기자들을 언제나 같은 방식으로 치하했지요.&n영원히 조용히 지낼 수 있게... 예의를 갖춰 주시길 부탁드리지요.

1000608166.english: Hey! Are you kidding me? What if I just fly away? And Commander! Commander? Commander, you're not going?
1000608166.korean: 어이! 농담하는 거죠? 그냥 날아가 버리면 어떻게 해!&n그리고 사령관! 사령관은? 사령관은 안 가는 거야?

1000608167.english: Eeeet! Lethal! &n , let's head to the cave! This was Reporter Spriggan!
1000608167.korean: 이잇! 치사해!&n이, 일단 동굴로 출발합니다! 이상 리포터 스프리건이었습니다!

1000608168.english: I finally caught him! Can we go together?
1000608168.korean: 겨우 붙잡았네! 같이 좀 가면 안 돼?

1000608169.english: Your movements are pathetically slow. &n The reporters I know aren't this slow.
1000608169.korean: 한심할 만큼 움직임이 굼뜨시군요.&n제가 아는 기자들은 이렇게 무르지 않았습니다만.

1000608171.english: If you're here to have fun, I recommend the beach.
1000608171.korean: 부탁컨대, 놀이를 하는 기분으로 오셨다면, 해변을 추천해 드리지요.

1000608172.english: Who, who came to play?! Anyone can see that I'm doing it properly?! &n I'm going to start recording right away, so don't cause any trouble.
1000608172.korean: 누, 누가 놀러 왔대?! 누가 봐도 난 제대로 진행하고 있거든?! &n바로 녹화 진행할 거니까, 너나 사고나 치지 말라고.

1000608173.english: I'll go ahead and wait for you. &n Please don't cause trouble and embarrass me.
1000608173.korean: 저는 미리 가서 기다리고 있겠습니다.&n괜한 문제를 일으켜 절 곤란하게 만들지 마시길.

1000608174.english: Chi. It's pointless to weigh it... Huh!

1000608175.english: Hmm. Shall we begin? This is Spriggan Reporter. I am currently standing at the entrance to the Leoboros Vault.
1000608175.korean: 음음. 그럼 시작해 볼까?&n여긴 스프리건 기자입니다. 저는 지금 리오보로스의 금고의 입구에 서있는데요.

1000608176.english: As you can see, there are a lot of Bioroids gathered here. What's the story?
1000608176.korean: 보시는 것처럼, 이곳에는 수많은 바이오 로이드들이 모여 있습니다. &n무슨 사연이 있는 걸까요?

1000608177.english: Let's try to interview right away.

1000608178.english: Yes! Hello? This is Spriggan from Orca TV. Excuse me, just a moment!
1000608178.korean: 네! 안녕하세요? 오르카 TV의 스프리건입니다. 저, 저기 잠깐만요!

1000608179.english: Could you please introduce yourself briefly?

1000608180.english: Huh? What is this? Ah! It's similar to what they say at the event! This is the Dutch Girl Fairy, the mascot appointed by Captain New Triaina...
1000608180.korean: 에? 뭐야? 이거? 아! 행사장에서 말하는 거랑 비슷한 거구나!&n뉴 트리아이나 대장이 마스코트로 임명한 마스코트 더치걸 요정입니다...

1000608181.english: Huh? A mascot? Are you really doing the grueling work of standing here for long hours?
1000608181.korean: 응? 마스코트? 설마 여기서 장시간 서있는 가혹한 노동을 당하고 있는 겁니까?

1000608182.english: No, that's not it. I just said that Captain New Triaina should be playing around here?
1000608182.korean: 그런 거 아니야~. 그냥 여기서 뉴 트리아이나 대장이 놀고 있으면 된다고 했는데?

1000608183.english: Ah! It's sausage time! Then I have to go!
1000608183.korean: 아! 소시지 시간이야! 그럼 난 가 봐야 해!

1000608184.english: Camera?! Are you taking good pictures? Yes! She's stubbornly refusing to be interviewed. What on earth happened to that poor Dutch girl?!
1000608184.korean: 카메라?! 잘 찍고 있나요? 네! 취재를 완강하게 거부하는 모습입니다.&n가엾은 노동자 더치걸에게 대체 무슨 일이 있었던 것일까요?!

1000608185.english: Despite the harsh environment, Spriggan, pursuing justice and truth, will continue reporting! &n Hey there! Blonde Navy Lady! Can you spare some time?
1000608185.korean: 가혹한 환경이지만 정의와 진실을 쫓는 스프리건, 취재를 계속하겠습니다!&n거기! 금발 해군 아가씨! 시간 좀 내줄래요?

1000608187.english: What the hell is that idiot Neri talking about? If you're blonde, you should've called me.
1000608187.korean: 바보 네리가 또 뭐라는 거야? 금발이면 당연히 날 부른 거잖아.

1000608188.english: Looks like Horizon Force... what are they doing here?
1000608188.korean: 호라이즌 부대처럼 보이는데... 여기서 뭘 하고 있는 거죠?

1000608190.english: Hmm! Hmm! Commander? Are you listening? Undine is working really hard right now! I'll prepare a necklace even more amazing than the Sirene Vice Captain, so Commander...
1000608190.korean: 흠! 흠! 사령관 님? 듣고 계시나요? 지금 운디네 엄청 노력하고 있어요!&n제가 세이렌 부함장보다 더 어마어마한 목걸이를 준비해 드릴 테니까, 사령관님은...

1000608191.english: Huh? What? Didn't you come here to get some special sausages?
1000608191.korean: 으엥? 뭐라구? 여기 특제 소시지 구하러 온 거 아니었어?

1000608193.english: What does he keep saying?! Come on, Neri. We need to get the necklace first. The sausage... next.
1000608193.korean: 얘는 자꾸 뭐라는 거야?!&n얼른 따라와 네리. 목걸이를 구하는 게 먼저니까. 소시지는... 다음에.

1000608194.english: Well then... please look forward to it, Commander~. Hehe~!

1000608195.english: Shocking!! The Navy, blinded by precious metals! They're bribing the commander for their own gain... &n ... It's not clear what the gain is, but... they're seeking profit anyway!
1000608195.korean: 충격!! 귀금속에 눈이 멀어버린 해군! 사령관에게 금품을 상납해 자기의 이익을...&n에... 어떤 이익인지는 밝혀지지 않았습니다만... 어쨌든 이익을 도모하고 있습니다!

1000608197.english: Hold on! The interview isn't over yet! This isn't a game... It's a cruel reality of the vault for those who remain in Orca...
1000608197.korean: 거기 기다리세요! 인터뷰가 아직 끝나지 않았어요!&n이건 놀이가 아니라... 오르카에 잔류한 인원들에게 금고의 잔혹한 실상을...

1000608198.english: Oh my~. Who is this? &n How did you know I like cameras and come here?
1000608198.korean: 어머~. 이게 누구야. &n내가 카메라 좋아하는 건 어떻게 알고 여기 온 거야?

1000608200.english: How ignorant... she's not just a pirate, she's a buccaneer. &n How's she? Isn't she pretty? Aren't her clothes amazing?
1000608200.korean: 무식하긴... 단순한 해적이 아니라 버카니어야. &n어때? 예쁘지? 옷 죽이지?

1000608201.english: Well, by the way. What kind of reporting did you come out for?
1000608201.korean: 뭐, 그건 그렇고. 무슨 취재를 나온 거야?

1000608202.english: Yes. The truth about the sisters suffering under harsh labor...
1000608202.korean: 네. 가혹한 노동에 시달리고 있는 자매들의 진실을...

1000608203.english: The harsh ones are the Commander and Captain May! The Commander didn't even come looking for me! &n Captain May chased me away, so I'm just here picking up coins!
1000608203.korean: 가혹한 건 사령관과 메이 대장이야! 사령관은 찾아오지도 않고!&n메이 대장에게 쫓겨서 여기서 동전이나 줍고 있다고!

1000608204.english: Pirate?! Real pirates really do exist! &n It seems this pirate has taken refuge here because there's a bounty on his head...
1000608204.korean: 해적?! 리얼 해적이 리얼 존재했군요! &n아무래도 이 해적은 현상금이 걸려서 이곳으로 피난을 한 모 양...

1000608207.english: What are you doing?! Why are you shooting the gun?!
1000608207.korean: 무슨 짓이야?! 총은 왜 쏘고 그래?!

1000608208.english: Hehehe. That's because the reporter is stepping on my cutie. Come here~. Geumhwa.
1000608208.korean: 헤헤. 그야, 기자님이 내 귀염둥이를 밟고 있으니까 그러지.&n이리 온~. 금화야.

1000608209.english: Hmm~! It's pretty. It's also heavy... &n You're always looking straight ahead, so you're missing out on such precious things.
1000608209.korean: 으음~! 이쁜 것. 묵직하기도 해라...&n기자님도 그렇게 앞만 보고 다니니까. 이런 귀한 걸 놓치는 거야.

1000608210.english: ... Ah, more than that... Are you going to show that video to the commander? &n By any chance... Do you want to film something hotter? If you're interested, come this way... a little deeper.
1000608210.korean: ... 아, 그보다... 혹시 그 영상 사령관한테 보여주는 거지?&n혹시... 좀 더 화끈한 거 찍고 싶어? 마음 있으면 이쪽으로... 좀 깊은 곳으로 와보라고.

1000608211.english: Oh my goodness! &n The vault is infested with malnourished miners and even lewd pirates.
1000608211.korean: 맙소사!&n금고엔 영양실조 광산 노동자에, 음란한 해적까지 출몰하고 있습니다.

1000608214.english: Is it drinking this time?! We see scenes of soldiers' misbehavior. Was it because the labor was so harsh that they had no choice but to misbehave?
1000608214.korean: 이번엔 음주인가요?! 병사들의 일탈 장면이 보이고 있습니다.&n너무나도 가혹한 노역에 일탈을 할 수밖에 없었던 걸까요?

1000608216.english: Reporter? Are you talking about me?

1000608217.english: Who else could there be... hiccup

1000608218.english: I'm so happy! This is my first time being treated as a reporter since I arrived here. Could you introduce yourself?
1000608218.korean: 기뻐요! 여기 도착해서 처음으로 리포터 대접을 받았어요.&n소개 부탁드려도 될까요??

1000608219.english: I have 2,056 brownies... not that bad...

1000608220.english: It's been three days since I ran away from Colonel Night Angel.... &n I'm tired of hiding... I want to go back to the beach... to Orca...
1000608220.korean: 나이트 앤젤 대령님에게서 도망친 지도 3일째....&n이제 숨어 지내는 건 지쳤슴다... 해변으로... 오르카로 돌아가고싶슴다...

1000608221.english: You ran away? Could it be... you deserted?

1000608222.english: Oh... We're not deserting! We're just...

1000608223.korean: 그저, 납작한 대령님을 피해 다니는 거지 말입니다.

1000608225.english: Did you hear what Brownie said? Did you get the picture right?! &n A haven for deserters... Is this place truly hopeless?
1000608225.korean: 브라우니가 하는 말 들었어요? 제대로 찍혔겠죠?!&n탈영병들의 도피처.... 여긴 정말 희망이 없는 걸 까요?

1000608226.english: I've heard some interesting opinions. &n Now you're starting to look like a journalist.
1000608226.korean: 흥미로운 의견 잘 들었습니다.&n이제서야 기자다운 모습이 보이기 시작하는군요.

1000608227.english: You said you were going to go first, so why are you back here?
1000608227.korean: 당신. 먼저 가 있는다고 하셨는데, 여긴 왜 돌아왔죠?

1000608228.english: To get inside, you'll have to deal with the puppets your brother left behind.
1000608228.korean: 내부로 진입하기 위해서는 형제가 남긴 꼭두각시들을 상대해야 할 겁니다.

1000608229.english: As Your Majesty the Commander commands, I will help you avoid becoming a beehive. So please, stay with me.
1000608229.korean: 사령관 각하의 명령대로, 기자님이 벌집이 되는 상황만은 피할 수 있도록 도와드리겠습니다.&n그러니 부탁드립니다. 제게서 떨어지지 마십시오.

1000608230.english: So... you're saying you'll help me? &n Okay! I'm a former soldier, too. I'm confident in my abilities.
1000608230.korean: 그러니까... 도와주겠다는 말이죠?&n좋아요! 저도 군인 출신이라구요. 실력엔 자신 있다구요.

1000608231.english: ... Indeed... The skill to be confident even with such a weapon. &n I'm looking forward to it. Well then... Let's sing a requiem for our brothers with gunpowder!
1000608231.korean: ... 과연... 그런 무기를 들고도 자신할 수 있는 실력. &n기대가 되는군요. 그럼... 한 번... 형제를 위한 진혼곡을 화약으로 울려 봅시다!

1000608233.english: Thanks to the efforts of our experienced treasure hunters, the battle was successfully concluded. Let's go inside the vault for a closer look.
1000608233.korean: 노련한 트레저 헌터들의 활약으로 전투는 성공적으로 마무리되었습니다.&n자세한 조사를 위해 금고 내부로 들어가 보겠습니다.

1000608234.english: But... what on earth is this place? The atmosphere...
1000608234.korean: 그런데... 여긴 대체 뭘 하던 곳이죠? 분위기가....

1000608235.english: Here, take a picture here! These massive devices look like they'll be up and running at any moment.
1000608235.korean: 여기, 여길 좀 찍어주세요! 이 거대한 장치들은 금방이라도 작동할 것 같습니다.

1000608236.english: Traces of a fierce battle remain here, and robot remains can be found everywhere.
1000608236.korean: 이곳에는 격렬했던 전투의 흔적이 남아있습니다. 그리고,&n로봇의 잔해를 곳곳에서 확인할 수 있습니다.

1000608237.english: Hey, hey! Mr. Roc! The cave's gonna collapse! Watch out!
1000608237.korean: 거, 거기! 로크 씨! 굴이 무너지겠어요! 조심하세요!

1000608238.english: Increased heart rate, dilated pupils. That's how living things often express fear. But, did you say Spriggan? Just wait a moment.
1000608238.korean: 심장 박동 수의 증가, 동공의 흔들림. 생체가 흔히 공포를 표현하는 방식이군요.&n하지만, 스프리건이라고 했나요? 지금은 잠시만 기다려 주십시오.

1000608239.english: There are some signals that require some focus.
1000608239.korean: 조금 집중해야 할 신호가 있으니 말입니다.

1000608240.english: Uh... um... okay, I get it. &n Can you just be quiet for a moment? You'll answer me in a bit, right?
1000608240.korean: 에... 음... 일단은 알았어.&n잠시만 조용히 하고 있으면 되는 거야? 조금 있으면 대답해 줄 거지?

1000608243.english: Sure. It's the same model as you? But why is it like this...
1000608243.korean: 확실해. 너와 같은 모델이네?&n그런데 어째서 이런 꼴로...

1000608246.english: You were looking for me, brother...

1000608248.english: Roc? If it's a transmitter, it's here. But... it's already broken.
1000608248.korean: 로크? 송신기라면 여기 있어. 그런데... 이미 망가져 있는데?

1000608249.english: "Wh-it's scary. Roc, is something important broken right now? Is your head okay?"
1000608249.korean: 무, 무서워. 로크, 지금 중요한 게 고장 난 거 아냐? 머리 괜찮아?

1000608250.english: Haha. There's no room for argument. Perhaps there was a minor mistake during the maintenance phase.
1000608250.korean: 하하. 반박할만한 여지가 없군요.&n아마 정비 단계에서 사소한 실수가 있었겠지요.

1000608251.english: I'll have to request a thorough examination as soon as I get back.

1000608252.english: Spriggan, you said you were a reporter, right?

1000608253.english: Our business here is complete. Let's return to Orca.

1000608254.english: Ugh... I'm anxious... I have to go back with a broken AGS...
1000608254.korean: 으으.. 불안해... 고장 난 AGS랑 돌아가야 된다니...

1000608256.english: Wait a minute! Roc? You left this behind. Is this alcohol? Isn't it precious? It takes time to make... and I heard it's hard to find these days...
1000608256.korean: 저기 잠깐만! 로크? 이거 놔두고 갔어. 이거 술이지?&n귀한 거 아냐? 만드는 데 시간도 걸리고... 이젠 구하기도 힘들다고 들었는데...

1000608257.english: ...The Bioroids under His Excellency the Commander spoke of things like respect, emotion, and condolences.
1000608257.korean: ... 사령관 각하 휘하의 바이오로이드들은 존중이나 감정, 애도 같은 이야기를 하더군요.

1000608258.english: What the... No way... This is...

1000608259.english: Please don't misunderstand. I didn't do this because I had any lingering feelings.
1000608259.korean: 오해하지 마시기 바랍니다. 제게 감정이 남아 있어서 이런 행동을 한 건 아닙니다.

1000608260.english: However... I just thought it would be okay to have some consciousness since I'd decided to take on a new mission. &n In Bioroid terms...
1000608260.korean: 다만... 새로운 임무를 수행하기로 한 이상, 약간의 의식이 있는 건 괜찮지 않을까 생각했을 뿐입니다.&n바이오로이드 식으로 말하면...

1000608261.english: Ah! Right... I guess it's fitting to say goodbye to the past. And sadly... I don't mean that in a sentimental way... I mean it literally. It's also a tribute to my brother.
1000608261.korean: 아! 그래... 과거와의 결별이 어울리겠군요. &n그리고 안타까운... 감성적인 말이 아니라... 사실 그대로 말입니다. 제 형제에 대한 애도이기도 하고요.

1000608262.english: Maybe... this makes me feel like I've become a complete Orca Roc.
1000608262.korean: 어쩌면... 이걸로 온전한 오르카의 로크가 된 기분이 드는군요.

1000608263.english: How do you feel? Did you say how you feel right now?

1000608264.english: Sorry, the logic circuit has made a slight error. &n I'm not in the mood... Well, I guess it doesn't matter.
1000608264.korean: 죄송합니다. 논리 회로가 약간의 오류를 일으켰습니다. &n기분이 아니라 음... 뭐 아무래도 좋지 않겠습니까?

1000608265.english: Hmm... As Fortune said, not all robots are the same...
1000608265.korean: 흐응... 포츈 언니 말이 로봇이라고 다 같지는 않다더니...

1000608266.english: Diversity is a great help in the structure of an organization. Of course, this only applies to diversity that is rational...
1000608266.korean: 다양성은 조직의 구성에 큰 도움이 되지요.&n물론 이성을 갖춘 다양성에 한해서입니다만...

1000608267.english: Now that I've become the Roc of Orca, I'm sure there will be a lot of things ahead of me.
1000608267.korean: 제가 오르카의 로크가 된 이상 제겐 아마 앞으로 많은 일이 있을 겁니다.

1000608268.english: However, I hope that later I can 'tell' you this story.
1000608268.korean: 다만, 나중에는 제가 이렇게 '이야기'해 드릴 수 있기를 바랍니다.

1000608269.english: Through all these days, I have become more complete and have learned a lot.
1000608269.korean: 오늘의 모든 날을 거쳐서 제가 완성되어 왔고 많은 것을 배울 수 있었다고.

1000608270.english: After burning endlessly like the flickering flames of midsummer, I said I was happy.
1000608270.korean: 한여름의 명멸하는 불꽃처럼 끝없이 태운 후에 즐거웠노라고 말입니다.

1000608271.english: I'm not sure if you can learn about pleasure though.
1000608271.korean: 즐거움에 대해서 배울 수 있을지는 확실치 않습니다만.

1000608272.english: I've been talking too much. &n Hmm... It looks like Orca's engineers and technicians have added some useless features to my circuitry.
1000608272.korean: 제가 말이 많았군요. &n흠... 오르카의 공학자와 기술자들이 제 회로에 쓸데없는 기능을 넣은 모양입니다.

1000608273.english: You may go now. The Commander will be waiting...
1000608273.korean: 이만 가시지요. 사령관 각하께서 기다리실 테니...

1000608274.english: Hey, wait a minute! Why are you going so fast!
1000608274.korean: 어어? 자 잠깐! 어째서 그렇게 빨리 가는 거야!

1000608275.english: Wait!! The interview isn't over yet!!!

1000608277.english: What the heck. You two are just talking about boring stuff, so I have no choice but to fall asleep... Huh...?
1000608277.korean: 뭐야. 둘 다 재미없는 이야기만 잔뜩 하니까 내가 잠들 수밖에... 어...?

1000608279.english: Hey, wait!!! Is anyone here? Reporter Spriggan? A crow?
1000608279.korean: 자, 잠깐!!! 아무도 없어요?&n리포터 스프리건? 까마귀야?

1000608280.english: What! What! Did you really appoint me as your cinematographer and then abandon me?
1000608280.korean: 뭐야! 뭐야! 설마 촬영 감독으로 임명하고 날 버리고 간 거야?

1000608282.english: Well... I guess it's okay? Getting out of here would be a good adventure. Plus, since I have a microphone, I might as well try my hand at becoming a broadcaster.
1000608282.korean: 뭐... 아무래도 좋은가? &n여기서 나가는 것도 좋은 모험이 될 테니까. 덤으로 이왕 마이크도 있는 김에 방송인으로 거듭나 보는 거야.

1000608283.english: Ahhh! Mic test. We're recruiting new explorers!!!! If you can hear the voice, please come to the core area inside the labyrinth!
1000608283.korean: 아아! 마이크 테스트. 모두 새로운 탐험대원을 모집합니다!!!!&n목소리가 들리시는 분은 미궁 안쪽의 코어 부분으로 모두 오시기 바랍니다!

1000608284.english: Come on!!! Everyone, gather around! It's a new adventure from cinematographer Neo New Triaina!
1000608284.korean: 자!!! 모두들 모여 보라고! 네오 뉴 트리아이나 촬영 감독의 새로운 모험이니까!

1000608285.english: It's an adventure to escape from the dark labyrinth!

1000608287.english: Do you happen to know of any other routes back to Orca?
1000608287.korean: 혹시 오르카로 복귀하는 다른 통로도 알고계심까?

1000608288.english: Another passage? Hehe! I don't know right now, but if we look for it together, I'm sure we'll find a way.
1000608288.korean: 다른 통로? 헤헷! 지금은 모르지만, 같이 찾아보면 분명 길을 찾을 수 있을 거야.

1000608289.english: Is everyone listening? Come on! Everyone, gather around!
1000608289.korean: 모두들 듣고 있지? 자! 모두 모이라고!

1000608290.english: Let's go together! It'll definitely be fun!

1000608291.english: I want to touch Hachiko too!

1000608294.english: It's no use looking at it like that.

1000608295.english: You want to ask for something the master gave you? Absolutely not.
1000608295.korean: 주인님께서 선물해 주신 걸 달라고요? 절대 안 돼요.

1000608298.english: ...I've been looking for you for a long time, Sister.

1000608299.english: What on earth were you doing, hiding in a place like this?
1000608299.korean: 이런 곳에 숨어서, 대체 뭘 하고 계셨던 거죠?

1000608300.english: Meow~. Hehehe... &n What business did our Perrault have here?
1000608300.korean: 야옹~. 후후훗... &n우리 페로가 여긴 무슨 볼일이 있어 찾아왔을까?

1000608301.english: My sister was playing with our cute Hachiko.
1000608301.korean: 언니는 우리 귀여운 하치코와 놀아주고 있었죠.

1000608304.english: Does your sister have the 'key card' that the owner lost?

1000608305.english: The owner is looking for it, please return it.

1000608306.english: Oh my? Could this be what Perrault said?
1000608306.korean: 어머? 페로가 말한 게 설마 이건 가요?

1000608307.english: I think there's some misunderstanding, this is a gift from my master.
1000608307.korean: 뭔가 오해하고 있는 것 같은데, 이건 주인님께서 제게 주신 선물이에요.

1000608308.english: ... Carelessly... &n in the master's own way... secretly... romantically...

1000608309.english: No, you accidentally dropped it on the ground. It's a lost item.
1000608309.korean: 아니요, 실수로 땅에 떨어뜨리신 겁니다. 분실물이란 말이죠.

1000608311.english: Okay... Okay. How about we do this? &n You give me back the card, and you take this instead.
1000608311.korean: 네... 좋아요. 그러면 이렇게 하는 건 어때요?&n카드는 제게 돌려주시고, 대신 이걸 가져가시는 겁니다.

1000608313.english: The master told me to give it to my sister instead. &n ... Carelessly.
1000608313.korean: 주인님께서 언니에게 그것 대신 전해 주라 하셨어요.&n... 무심하게. 말이죠.

1000608314.english: Really? Is this a gift from the master? I bet you'll be happy...

1000608315.english: Perrault. Perrault? Don't you have Hachiko's?

1000608318.english: The master will definitely give Hachiko something better, right? Perrault?
1000608318.korean: 주인님은 분명 하치코한테 더 좋은 걸 주실 거야.&n그치? 페로?

1000608321.english: I really like this clumsy side of you, Master. You could be honest with me. Is that still difficult?
1000608321.korean: 주인님의 이런 서툰 모습 너무 좋아.&n솔직하게 고백하셔도 되는데. 그건 아직 힘드신 걸까요?

1000608322.english: I don't know what you're thinking, but I'll return this card to you.
1000608322.korean: 뭘 상상하고 계신지는 모르겠지만. 이 카드는 제가 주인님께 돌려 드릴게요.

1000608323.english: ...Sister?! Why is there perfume on the key card...?
1000608323.korean: ... 언니?! 키 카드에 향수는 대체 왜...?

1000608324.english: Ah... no, nothing... everyone, please focus on your work. &n I'm off...
1000608324.korean: 아... 아녜요 아무것도... 모두 업무에 집중해 주세요.&n전 이만...

1000608327.english: This is it! This is the true sign of love!
1000608327.korean: 이거예요! 이게 바로 진정한 사랑의 증표군요!

1000608328.english: Isn't that right, Mr. Sinister Chef?

1000608329.english: Is it true? You have it in your hand. The master gave it to you?
1000608329.korean: 사실인가요? 당신 손에 그것. 주인님이 주셨다고요?

1000608330.english: Ahhh. I didn't mean to brag so much, but this is how things turned out.
1000608330.korean: 아-. 헤프게 자랑할 생각은 없었는데. 일이 이렇게 되어버리네요.

1000608331.english: Yes! That's right. It's a gift my master gave me. It's a proof that I belong to him.
1000608331.korean: 네! 맞아요. 주인님께서 제게 주신 선물이에요.&n제가 주인님의 것이라는 증표에요.

1000608332.english: Sowan? The kitchen has been a mess for days...

1000608335.english: Master... why did you do this to such a worthless woman...

1000608338.english: Sowan's communicator has been turned off. If there is any problem with the equipment, please contact the person in charge.
1000608338.korean: 여태 소완씨의 통신기가 꺼져 있더군요.&n혹시 장비에 문제가 생겼다면 담당자를 찾아주세요.

1000608339.english: I have a few questions regarding this banquet...
1000608339.korean: 제가 몇 가지 여쭤볼 게 있어요, 이번 연회와 관련해서...

1000608340.english: Ah... no need to worry about that.

1000608342.english: ...But, Mr. Sowan? It's hard to meet you, and your complexion is so gloomy...
1000608342.korean: ... 그런데, 소완씨? 찾아뵙기도 어렵고, 안색이 너무 어둡네요...

1000608344.english: ...I have something urgent to do... so please excuse me.
1000608344.korean: ... 급히 해야 할 일이 생겨... 이만 실례하겠사옵니다.

1000608348.english: Why are you looking for me...

1000608349.english: Phew... Are you really asking because you don't know?

1000608350.english: Vanilla? I promised my sister that I'd hear Sowan's story first.
1000608350.korean: 바닐라? 소완씨 이야기를 먼저 들어보기로 언니랑 약속했잖니.

1000608352.english: I heard there are a lot of accidents in your area, so I'm wondering if there's anything we can do to help...
1000608352.korean: 맡고 계신 구역에서 사고가 많이 발생한다던데,&n무슨 문제가 있나 해서요. 저희가 도울 수 있는 일이라면...

1000608353.english: Sowan? Do you see these documents?

1000608354.english: These are the items that were lost in the kitchen over the past week.

1000608355.english: Fire, fire, fire... &n Really... I can't believe my eyes even when I look at it again.
1000608355.korean: 전소, 화재, 전소...&n정말... 다시 봐도 제 눈을 믿을 수 없네요.

1000608356.english: Did you have a war in the kitchen? &n Please don't just sign and hand it over to me. Please also provide a convincing reason.
1000608356.korean: 주방에서 전쟁이라도 벌이셨나요?&n사인만 해서 제게 넘겨주지 마시고, 납득할만한 사유도 적어주세요.

1000608357.english: I can handle it somehow, but my sister... no, the housekeeper can't do other work.
1000608357.korean: 저는 어떻게든 처리할 수 있지만, 우리 언니... 아니. 하우스키퍼님이&n다른 업무를 볼 수 없으세요.

1000608359.english: Excuse me, I'm really sorry Vanilla... Shouldn't Vanilla go back first? &n I think it would be good for Vanilla to rest a bit too, Unnie.
1000608359.korean: 저기, 정말 미안해 바닐라... 바닐라는 먼저 돌아가 있지 않을래?&n언니 생각으로는, 바닐라도 조금 쉬는 게 좋을 것 같아.

1000608361.english: ...I didn't mean to tire you out, sister... I'm sorry.
1000608361.korean: ... 언니까지 피곤하게 할 생각은 없었는데... 죄송해요.

1000608362.english: And... Mr. Sowan? If my words were harsh... I apologize.
1000608362.korean: 그리고... 소완씨? 제 말이 심했다면... 사과드리죠.

1000608364.english: I'm really sorry. This is a bit overwhelming for Vanilla, too...
1000608364.korean: 정말 미안해요. 이번 일은 바닐라에게도 조금 벅찬 일이라...

1000608365.english: Are you uncomfortable with your seat? Would it be better to move?
1000608365.korean: 자리가 불편하시죠?, 자리를 옮기는 게 나을까요?

1000608366.english: I appreciate your consideration, but this place is enough for me.

1000608367.english: This incident... was just a minor setback. I'll be careful not to have this happen again.
1000608367.korean: 이번 일은... 그저 자그마한 마가 끼었을 뿐입니다.&n앞으로는 이런 일 없도록 주의하지요.

1000608368.english: Haha. Is that so? Yes, if that's true, I'm really glad. I won't bother Sowan with this issue any more.
1000608368.korean: 후후. 그런가요? 네, 그렇다면 정말 다행이에요.&n더는 이 문제로 소완씨를 불편하게 만들지 않을게요.

1000608369.english: And. Separate from what we just talked about... &n A while ago, while checking the incoming goods, I came across an ingredient I had never seen before.
1000608369.korean: 그리고. 방금 이야기와는 별개로... &n얼마 전, 반입 물품을 확인하는 도중에 제가 처음 보는 식재료를 발견했어요.

1000608370.english: At first glance, it seemed like a common herb... but it turned out to be a plant known for its lethal ingredients to the body.
1000608370.korean: 얼핏 봤을 때는 흔한 약초 같았는데... &n알고 보니 신체에 치명적인 성분으로 유명한 식물이더군요.

1000608371.english: I disposed of all that grass. &n But I hope you don't take it too badly.
1000608371.korean: 그 풀은 제가 모두 폐기했어요.&n다만, 너무 언짢게 생각하지 않으셨으면 좋겠어요.

1000608372.english: Sowan? Would you like to have an honest conversation with me?
1000608372.korean: 소완씨? 뭐든 좋으니까, 저와 솔직하게 이야기를 나눠보시지 않겠어요?

1000608373.english: I heard that Black Lilith received a gift from her master.
1000608373.korean: 블랙 리리스양이 주인님께 선물을 받았다고 들었사옵니다.

1000608374.english: I don't understand. Why would you do something like that, Master... &n Hmm...
1000608374.korean: 저는 이해할 수 없사옵니다. 주인님께서는 어찌하여 그런...&n흐음...

1000608375.english: Haha. So that's why you had a hard time?

1000608376.english: ...I didn't expect this kind of reaction... &n Maid, aren't you concerned about Miss Lilith and me?
1000608376.korean: ... 이런 반응은 예상하지 못했사옵니다...&n메이드장 님께선, 리리스양과 제가 신경 쓰이지 않습니까?

1000608377.english: Well, I can't say that's not true. &n After all, I'm your maid.
1000608377.korean: 으음, 그렇지 않다고는 할 수 없지만.&n저는 주인님의 메이드니까요.

1000608378.english: Surely... you're not going to show me any leeway, are you?
1000608378.korean: 설마... 절 두고 여유를 보이는 것은 아니시겠지요?

1000608379.english: Oh my? It's embarrassing if you look like that...

1000608380.english: Hmm... You are a really interesting person... &n Thanks to you, I feel like I'm coming to my senses.
1000608380.korean: 흐음... 정말 흥미로운 분이시군요...&n덕분에 정신이 돌아오는 것 같사옵니다.

1000608381.english: ... Let me be honest with you. What do you like, Master? No. Let me rephrase the question...
1000608381.korean: ... 솔직하게 말씀드리겠사옵니다. 주인님은 뭘 좋아하시죠?&n아뇨. 질문을 바꿔보겠사옵니다...

1000608382.english: If you were alone with your master, Constantia... &n what would you like to do with your master...
1000608382.korean: 콘스탄챠님이 주인님과 단둘이 있다면...&n주인님과 어떤 일을 하고 싶으신지요...

1000608384.english: Hmm... If only it were just me and the master...

1000608385.english: On a nice day, it would be nice to pack a lunch and go on a picnic with your master.
1000608385.korean: 날씨가 좋은 날에. 주인님과 도시락을 싸서 소풍을 가는 게 좋겠네요.

1000608387.english: Yes. The lunchbox I prepared with great care... the owner...
1000608387.korean: 네. 제가 정성스럽게 준비한 도시락을... 주인님께서...

1000608388.english: Oh my, what am I saying...

1000608389.english: Excuse me. Is there anything else I can tell you?

1000608390.english: ... Finally, I have one more personal question for you...
1000608390.korean: ... 마지막으로 개인적인 질문을 하나만 더 하겠사옵니다...

1000608391.english: Maid, have you ever gone on a picnic with your master?
1000608391.korean: 메이드장 님께서는 주인님과 소풍을 다녀온 적이 있사옵니까?

1000608394.english: - I'm in a difficult situation right now.

1000608396.english: - What is the most difficult question in the world?

1000608398.english: What would you like to eat most, sir?
1000608398.korean: 주인님께서 가장 드시고 싶으신 게 무엇인지요?

1000608399.english: - Sowan, who exudes a different atmosphere than usual.
1000608399.korean: - 평소와 또 다른 분위기를 풍기는 소완.

1000608400.english: - Sowan is always difficult, but today it feels even more difficult. Did something happen?
1000608400.korean: - 소완은 늘 어렵지만, 오늘따라 더욱더 어렵게 느껴진다.&n무슨 일이라도 생긴 걸까?

1000608401.english: - Sowan was waiting for my answer quietly as usual. &n ... But nothing suitable came to mind.
1000608401.korean: - 소완은 여느 때처럼 다소곳하게 내 대답만 기다리고 있었지만.&n... 도무지 적당한 게 떠오르질 않는다.

1000608402.english: - Did you just frown?! You don't like wasting time, do you... Calm down. Let's think.
1000608402.korean: - 방금 얼굴을 찌푸린 건가?! 시간을 끄는 게 마음에 들지 않겠지...&n침착해. 생각해내자.

1000608404.english: I wasn't asking Hachiko a question. And the owner said the meat pie...
1000608404.korean: 하치코한테 질문한게 아니야. 그리고 주인님께서는 미트파이를...

1000608406.english: Wow~! Master, you like Hachiko meat pie the best, right?
1000608406.korean: 꺄아~! 주인님도 하치코 미트파이가 제일 좋죠?

1000608407.english: - I answered without thinking, but I think something like a meat pie would be fine.
1000608407.korean: - 얼떨결에 답하긴 했지만, 확실히 미트파이 정도면 무난한 것 같다.

1000608408.english: Hachiko likes meat pie, but he likes his master more.
1000608408.korean: 하치코는 미트파이도 좋아하지만, 주인님이 더 좋아요.

1000608409.english: Is that so? I understand and will prepare accordingly.

1000608412.english: - He occasionally shows eccentric behavior, but this is the first time I've seen him rush like this...
1000608412.korean: - 간간히 기행을 보이긴 하지만, 이렇게 까지 서두르는 모습은 처음인데...

1000608413.english: ...If it's okay with you, Master, I was thinking about going on a picnic with you...
1000608413.korean: ... 주인님만 괜찮으시다면, 소첩과 함께 소풍을 가는 건 어떨까 싶어서...

1000608415.english: I think the master still has some anger towards me...
1000608415.korean: 아직, 주인님께서는 소첩에게 노여움이 남아있으리라 생각해...

1000608417.english: - I hope this picnic will be an opportunity to clear up the misunderstanding between the Orca members and Sowan.
1000608417.korean: - 이번 소풍을 기회로 오르카 인원들과 소완과의 오해가 풀렸으면 좋겠다.

1000608418.english: ...I will do my best for you, Master...

1000608419.english: Master, please reconsider. Are you sure it's okay?
1000608419.korean: 주인님. 다시 한번 생각해 주세요. 정말 괜찮으시겠어요?

1000608421.english: - I'm really looking forward to the picnic. I'm sure Sowan will prepare it thoroughly.
1000608421.korean: - 소풍이라니 제법 기대된다. 소완이라면 꼼꼼하게 준비해 주겠지.

1000608422.english: Yes... I will now step aside.

1000608425.english: I just got it delivered and am on my way back. You're planning a picnic with your master, right?
1000608425.korean: 방금 전달받고 오는 길입니다. 주인님과 소풍을 가기로 하셨다고요?

1000608426.english: You're being so relaxed, leaving your notebook behind... Isn't that too much?
1000608426.korean: 소첩을 두고, 여유를 보이시다니... 너무 무른것 아닙니까?

1000608428.english: Shall we prepare together? Let's prepare lunch boxes together.
1000608428.korean: 우리 함께 준비를 해볼까요? 도시락도 같이 준비하고요.

1000608429.english: ... I can't help it if Constance comes along too.
1000608429.korean: ... 콘스탄챠님도 동행하시는 건, 어쩔 수 없지만.

1000608432.english: Then I'll look for a picnic spot. There are so many places that come to mind right now~!
1000608432.korean: 그러면 전, 소풍 장소를 물색해 볼게요.&n지금 떠오르는 곳이 너무 많아요~!

1000608435.english: Huh? Miss Hachiko? Where is Mr. Sowan?

1000608436.english: Hachiko, that's not a toy. Please give it back.

1000608437.english: I'm truly sorry. I'm a little busy preparing the master's meal...
1000608437.korean: 정말 죄송합니다. 저는 주인님의 식사 준비로 조금 바쁩니다만...

1000608438.english: Oh, you're here. I was just going to tell you where we're going for a picnic.

1000608439.english: It's a quiet and very beautiful place. I'm sure the owner will like it too.
1000608439.korean: 조용하고 무척 아름다운 곳이에요. 분명 주인님도 마음에 들어 하실 테죠.

1000608440.english: However, there are still a few Metal Parasite left there, so they need to be cleaned up.
1000608440.korean: 다만, 그곳에도 적게나마 철충들이 남아있어서 정리를 해야 할 거예요.

1000608441.english: Are you talking about Ironworm? That shouldn't be a problem.
1000608441.korean: 철충 말씀이시옵니까? 그런 건 문제 될 것 하나 없사옵니다.

1000608442.english: And... for the master's safety, we plan to increase security. Black Lilith will also be accompanying him.
1000608442.korean: 그리고... 주인님의 안전을 위해서 경호를 늘릴 계획인데.&n블랙 리리스양도 동행할 예정이에요.

1000608443.english: Even though you know that I'm not on good terms with Lilith...
1000608443.korean: 제가 리리스양과 사이가 좋지 않은 걸 알고 계시면서도...

1000608444.english: Ah. That's a misunderstanding. &n It was an unavoidable choice, as it concerned the owner's personal safety.
1000608444.korean: 아. 그건 오해예요. &n주인님의 신변에 관련된 것이라, 어쩔 수 없는 선택이었어요.

1000608445.english: If you say so, how can I object... &n I will abide by your decision.
1000608445.korean: 그렇게 말씀하신다면야. 제가 어찌 반대할 수 있겠습니까...&n결정에 따르겠사옵니다.

1000608447.english: If there are any other changes, I will let you know right away. &n Well, thank you for your consideration.
1000608447.korean: 다른 변동 사항이 있으면, 곧장 알려드릴게요.&n그럼, 잘 부탁드려요.

1000608448.english: It's been a while since we've had a picnic. There's a lot to prepare.
1000608448.korean: 오래간만에 소풍이라니. 이것저것 준비할 것들이 많군요.

1000608449.english: Sowan? All the maids are ready.

1000608452.english: Sister Sowan doesn't like her lunchbox...
1000608452.korean: 소완 언니는 도시락이 마음에 들지 않는데요...

1000608454.english: Come to think of it, are all those piled up over there lunch boxes?
1000608454.korean: 그러고 보니, 설마... 저기 쌓여있는 게 전부 도시락인가요?

1000608455.english: Yeah... but... I don't like it all...
1000608455.korean: 네... 그치만... 전부 마음에 안 든대요...

1000608456.english: A lunchbox can't serve the best food... &n The taste, the aroma, the flavor... none of it will satisfy the owner...
1000608456.korean: 도시락으로는 최고의 요리를 대접할 수 없습니다...&n맛, 향, 풍미... 무엇 하나 주인님을 만족시켜드릴 수 없을 테지요...

1000608457.english: I will not be attending this outing.

1000608458.english: Hmm... I don't think that's right, Sowan is missing.
1000608458.korean: 으음... 소완씨가 빠진다니, 그건 아니라고 생각해요.

1000608459.english: The master wants Sowan to join him.

1000608460.english: Rather than the taste of the lunch box, isn't it more important to be able to eat together?
1000608460.korean: 도시락의 맛이 아니라, 함께 식사를 할 수 있는 것이 더 중요하지 않을까요?

1000608462.english: The owner said that Hachiko Pie is the most delicious pie in the world when eaten together.
1000608462.korean: 하치코 파이는 같이 먹을 때, 세상에서 제일 맛있는 파이라 하셨어요.&n주인님이 그렇게 말씀하셨어요.

1000608463.english: Right? If it were the master, he would definitely have said that.

1000608464.english: Sowan? What would you like to do?

1000608465.english: If you say so, I will attend too...

1000608466.english: What the maid said is correct.

1000608467.english: Yes? What are you talking about?

1000608468.english: The usual Black Lilith... was just a nuisance to me. &n But she was a great help on this outing.
1000608468.korean: 평소의 블랙 리리스양은... 제게 방해만 되는 존재였지만.&n이번 나들이에는 큰 도움이 되었사옵니다.

1000608469.english: I'm so glad you think so. Thank you, Sowan.
1000608469.korean: 그렇게 생각해 주신다면, 정말 다행이네요. 고마워요 소완.

1000608470.english: You wanted to go on a picnic with your master without me? You're really amazing.
1000608470.korean: 절 빼놓고 주인님과 소풍을 가려고 했다니.&n정말 대단하세요.

1000608471.english: I don't want to come all the way here and fight with Lilith.
1000608471.korean: 이곳까지 와서 리리스양과 다투고 싶진 않사옵니다.

1000608472.english: Hahaha... You still speak well, don't you?

1000608473.english: Until we return to Orca, don't even think about leaving my sight. &n If you sense anything even slightly suspicious...
1000608473.korean: 오르카로 복귀할 때까지. 내 시야에서 벗어날 생각 마세요.&n조금이라도 수상한 낌새가...

1000608475.english: Here's the lunchbox I prepared. I hope you like it, Miss Lilith.
1000608475.korean: 제가 준비한 도시락이옵니다. 리리스양의 마음에 들었으면 좋겠사옵니다.

1000608476.english: Haha... You want me to eat the lunchbox you made? I'm so sorry, what can I do? I don't feel like it. Take it back.
1000608476.korean: 후후... 당신이 만든 도시락을 먹으라고요? &n미안해서 어쩌죠? 내키지 않네요. 다시 가져가세요.

1000608478.english: Is there anything that is inconvenient?

1000608479.english: Master~? I finished cleaning up the surroundings.

1000608481.english: - Were the maids preparing a meal? &n My heart flutters for no reason when I see the lunchbox Lilith is holding.
1000608481.korean: - 메이드들은 식사 준비를 하고 있었던 걸까?&n리리스가 들고 있는 도시락을 보니 괜히 마음이 설랜다.

1000608482.english: Yes? Oh, oh, this is... this is...
1000608482.korean: 네? 아, 아 이건... 이건 그러니까...

1000608483.english: I'm so happy to have this opportunity to apologize to Miss Lilith...
1000608483.korean: 이렇게 리리스양에게 사과할 기회가 생겨, 소첩은 정말 기쁩니다...

1000608485.english: If the master says so... I can't help it...
1000608485.korean: 주인님이 그렇게 말씀 하신다면... 어쩔 수 없네요...

1000608486.english: So, how about eating before the food gets cold?
1000608486.korean: 그러면, 음식이 식기 전에 식사를 하는 게 어떨까요?

1000608487.english: Master...? Here's a lunchbox I prepared... Please...

1000608488.english: The lunchbox Sowan handed me was surprisingly simple. The contents didn't show any special craftsmanship...
1000608488.korean: - 소완이 건네준 도시락은 예상과 달리 매우 소박했다.&n내용물도 특별하게 기교를 부린 흔적이 없고...

1000608489.english: - Literally, it was full of foods that were good for overeating.
1000608489.korean: - 말 그대로, 과식하기 좋은 음식들로 가득 차있었다.

1000608490.english: ...It is the concubine's duty to satisfy her master...
1000608490.korean: ... 주인님을 만족시켜 드리는 것이, 소첩의 의무이니까요...

1000608491.english: Sowan smiled shyly and sat down next to me. "It still feels a little awkward, but it'll get better."
1000608491.korean: - 소완은 수줍게 웃고는 내 옆자리에 앉았다. 아직 조금 어색한 감은 남아 있지만&n점점 나아질 테지.

1000608492.english: - I feel a cool breeze blowing, and I feel like I made the right decision to come on a picnic.
1000608492.korean: - 바람이 선선하게 불어오는 것이 느껴지고, 소풍 오기를 잘 했다는 생각이 든다..

1000608493.english: ... In this way, the Demon King Faucre gained the power of the Great Demon King and established a demon world in the human world.
1000608493.korean: ... 그렇게 뽀끄루 마왕은 대마왕의 힘을 얻어 인간 세계에 마계를 구축했어요.

1000608494.english: The five magical girls, with the exception of Moonbit, who remained, vowed to fight to the end, and were eventually forced to retreat to the moon. And together, they made a promise: to return to Earth, if only for the sake of the children who had been robbed of their laughter.
1000608494.korean: 다섯 명의 마법 소녀들은 끝까지 싸우겠다고 남은 백토를 빼고는 결국 달로 물러나야 했어요. &n그리고 함께 약속했죠. 웃음을 빼앗긴 어린이들을 위해서라도 꼭 지구로 돌아오겠다고.

1000608495.english: Oh, what should I do! Then what next? That won't do. &n The next episode... How...
1000608495.korean: 어, 어떡해요! 그럼, 그다음은요? 그럼 안되잖아요.&n다음 편은... 어떻게...

1000608496.english: Hehe... That's how August's Full Moon ended. And then... I couldn't make it. Because of that incident...
1000608496.korean: 헤헤... 8월의 만월야는 그렇게 끝났어요.&n그다음은... 제작을 못 했어요. 그 사건이 터져 버려서...

1000608497.english: Huh?! No! It couldn't have ended like that... It's so sad.
1000608497.korean: 네?! 안돼요! 그렇게 끝나버리다니... 너무 슬프잖아요.

1000608498.english: I'm really sorry... Unfortunately, Magical Girl Hakuto-hen [c][ffd130]August's Full Moon Night[-][/c] ends here. &n Originally, a sequel was scheduled to come out next holiday.
1000608498.korean: 정말 미안해요... 아쉽지만 마법 소녀 백토편 [c][ffd130]8월의 만월야[-][/c]는 여기까지에요.&n원래는 다음 명절에 속편이 나올 예정이었지만.

1000608500.english: Excuse me, Momo-san? I have a question.
1000608500.korean: 저, 그런데 모모 씨? 궁금한 게 있는데요.

1000608501.english: Yes. Go ahead, Leah. I'll tell you everything I know. &n Because I'm a magical girl!
1000608501.korean: 네. 말씀하세요. 레아님. 제가 아는 거라면 뭐든지 말씀드릴게요.&n마법 소녀니까요!

1000608502.english: So the part where they go to the moon base was actually filmed?
1000608502.korean: 그럼 달 기지로 간 부분은 실제로 촬영이 됐었잖아요.

1000608503.english: Yes, that's right. Actually, I didn't do the photoshoot myself, but another Momo model did.
1000608503.korean: 네. 그렇죠. 사실 제가 직접 한 촬영이 아니라 다른 모모 모델이 촬영하긴 했지만요.

1000608504.english: So how did you meet that magical girl named Moonbit again? I haven't heard anything about Moonbit...
1000608504.korean: 그럼 그 백토라는 마법소녀는 어떻게 다시 만난 건가요?&n백토씨에 대해서는 들은 게 없는데...

1000608505.english: Perhaps... I heard there are no surviving white clays. Sadly. Ah! Actually, there was a white clay made later. It was made by Mr. Labiata around the same time as mine...
1000608505.korean: 아마... 살아남은 백토는 없다고 들었어요. 안타깝게도요.&n아! 사실 이후에 만들어진 백토가 있긴 했어요. 저랑 거의 비슷한 시기에 라비아타 씨가 제조한...

1000608506.english: But... something went wrong... she left to find the Demon King Faucre... maybe... something went wrong during manufacturing, so it seemed like she really believed the magical girl story.
1000608506.korean: 하지만… 뭐가 잘못됐는지... 뽀끄루 대마왕을 찾겠다고 떠나 버렸어요... 아마... 제조시에 문제가 생겨 마법소녀 이야기를 진짜로 믿는 것 같았어요.

1000608507.english: Oh my, how did this happen... Then what happened to Moonbit? &n No way... What should I do... It's not wrong, is it?
1000608507.korean: 어머나 이를 어째... 그럼 백토씨는 어떻게 됐나요?&n설마... 어떡해... 잘못된 건 아니죠?

1000608508.english: Well... we also tried to stop Moonbit from going... but Moonbit was adamant... and we were brainwashed by Faucre... and Ironworm was also Faucre's doing...
1000608508.korean: 글쎄요... 저희도 백토가 가는 걸 말렸지만... 백토는 강경했어요...&n저희가 뽀끄루에게 세뇌당했고... 철충도 뽀끄루의 짓이라면서...

1000608509.english: I've heard that there are some Densetsu sisters like that...
1000608509.korean: 덴세츠의 자매들은 그런 분들도 있다고 듣긴 했지만...

1000608510.english: I wanted to stop Moonbit from chasing Faucre, but I couldn't stop Moonbit on my own.
1000608510.korean: 저는 뽀끄루를 쫓으려는 백토를 말리고 싶었지만, 제 혼자 힘으로는 백토를 도저히&n말릴 수 없었죠.

1000608511.english: Perhaps Moonbit... is still wandering alone in a dangerous area, without any help... I wish I could contact him somehow...
1000608511.korean: 어쩌면 백토는... 도움도 받지 못한 채, 아직도 위험한 지역을 혼자서 헤매고 있을지도...&n어떻게 연락이라도 되면 좋겠는데...

1000608513.english: Hehehe... I said something depressing for no reason.
1000608513.korean: 헤헤... 제가 괜히 우울한 이야기를 했네요.

1000608514.english: Ugh... I'm sorry, but a magical girl shouldn't tell such a sad story... &n My reason for existing is to give dreams and hope...
1000608514.korean: 우음... 죄송해요 마법소녀가 이렇게 슬픈 이야기를 하면 안 되는데...&n전 꿈과 희망을 주는 게 존재 이유인데...

1000608515.english: It's okay, Momo. Bioroids can be sad, too. When you're sad, you have to be sad to avoid mental illness. But more than that...
1000608515.korean: 괜찮아요. 모모 씨. 바이오로이드도 충분히 슬플 수 있어요.&n슬플 때는 슬퍼해야 마음의 병이 생기지 않는 거예요. 그런데 그것보다도...

1000608516.english: Have you ever thought about looking for Mr. Moonbit?
1000608516.korean: 백토 씨를 찾아볼 생각은 안 한 거예요?

1000608517.english: I want to find her, but... it seems like asking a dangerous favor of the other sisters... and I can't run away because of my own circumstances and cause trouble to the Commander.
1000608517.korean: 찾고는 싶지만... 다른 자매들에게 위험한 부탁을 하는 것 같고...&n저 혼자의 사정 때문에 뛰쳐나가서 사령관님에게 폐를 끼치면 안 되니까요.

1000608518.english: No. That won't do, Momo. Really... Momo is so kind and cute, what can I do...
1000608518.korean: 아니에요. 그럼 안돼요. 모모 씨. 정말... 모모 씨 정말 착하고 귀여워서 어떡해...

1000608519.english: They're so cute I want to hug them like little sisters, but... I can't. It's a nuisance. If they're Momo's sisters, then they're our sisters. They're just like my little sisters!
1000608519.korean: 너무 귀여워서 동생들처럼 꼭 끌어안아주고 싶지만... 그건 안돼요. 폐를 끼치다니요.&n모모 씨의 자매라면 우리의 자매인걸요. 제 동생이나 다름없어요!

1000608520.english: You wouldn't think of me as someone you'd be upset with? You wouldn't, would you?
1000608520.korean: 설마 섭섭하게 절 남으로 생각할 거예요? 그건 아니죠?

1000608521.english: Not really... But Moonbit is a truly excellent hunter. He's strong and doesn't make mistakes.
1000608521.korean: 그런 건 아니지만... &n백토는 정말 뛰어난 사냥꾼이에요. 강하고 실수를 하지 않아요.

1000608522.english: It's really hard to find traces of white clay.

1000608523.english: Is that so? Is it difficult? If it's difficult, then exploration, and for exploration, ahem! This very Triaina is what we need.
1000608523.korean: 그런가? 어려운 일인가? 어려운 일이라면 탐험,&n탐험에는 엣헴! 바로 이 트리아이나가 필요해 지지.

1000608524.english: Huh? Triaina? Hehe. Were you listening to our conversation from behind?
1000608524.korean: 응? 트리아이나? 후후. 뒤에서 우리 이야길 듣고 있었던 거예요?

1000608525.english: Leah, you're going too far. You're telling adventure stories without me... &n This former expedition leader, Neo New Triaina, is a huge disappointment.
1000608525.korean: 레아도 너무해. 날 빼놓고 모험 이야기를 하다니.... &n이 전직 탐험대장 네오 뉴 트리아이나는 실망이 크다네.

1000608526.english: There's a saying among famous quotes: The most difficult things are often the most fun adventures!
1000608526.korean: 명언 중에 그런 말이 있지. 가장 어려운 일이야말로, 가장 재밌는 모험이다!

1000608527.english: Huh? But... I've never heard anything like that...
1000608527.korean: 에? 하지만... 그런 말은 한 번도 들어본 적이 없는데...

1000608528.english: Of course. Because that's what I just said. Hehe. Since it's from this Neo New Triaina, it's definitely a famous quote. Who else is harder to find than that?
1000608528.korean: 당연하지. 방금 내가 한 말이니까. 히히. 이 네오 뉴 트리아이나의 말이니까&n명언이 틀림없다고. 그것보다 누굴 찾는 게 어렵단 거지?

1000608529.english: Hello. I'm Magical Momo, a magical girl. &n I've heard a lot about Triaina-san, Commander. Hehe. Nice to meet you.
1000608529.korean: 안녕하세요. 전 마법소녀 매지컬 모모라고 해요. &n사령관님께 트리아이나 씨의 이야기는 많이 들었어요. 헤헤. 반가워요.

1000608530.english: Then you must know I'm a hell of a treasure hunter, right? Hehe. Treasure hunting is all about finding traces. If I were to step forward, wouldn't it be easy to find traces of that white clay?
1000608530.korean: 그렇다면 내가 끝내주는 보물 사냥꾼이라는 것도 잘 알고 있겠네? 히히. 보물 사냥도 흔적을 &n찾는 게 기본이지. 이 몸이 나선다면 그 백토의 흔적을 찾는 것도 어렵진 않을 것 같은데?

1000608532.english: It's not that you feel bad about giving me adventures~! &n It's that you feel really bad about leaving me out of places like this. You won't disappoint me, will you, buddy?
1000608532.korean: 나한테 모험 거리를 주는 건 미안한 게 아니라고~!&n오히려 이런 데서 날 빼먹는 게 진짜 미안한 거지. 설마 날 실망시키진 않을 거지? 친구?

1000608533.english: Yes? Yes! Magical girls... never disappoint their friends!
1000608533.korean: 네? 네! 마법소녀는... 친구를 절대 실망시키지 않아요!

1000608534.english: Momo? Haha. Okay. It's decided! Everyone, let's work together! Let's find the white clay! Leah is ready to do her best too!
1000608534.korean: 모모 씨? 후후. 좋아요. 결정이 되었네요!&n모두들 힘을 합쳐서! 백토를 찾아보는 거예요! 레아도 최선을 다할 준비가 되었답니다!

1000608535.english: Really... thank you... yes! I'll do my best! Let's all do our best to find Moonbit! &n As Leah said, I won't give up. If I give up, the children's hope will disappear...
1000608535.korean: 정말... 고마워요... 네! 힘낼게요! 우리 모두 최선을 다해서 백토를 찾아봐요! &n레아 님의 말처럼 전 포기하지 않아요. 제가 포기하면 어린이들의 희망이 사라질 테니...

1000608536.english: Hehe... I don't have any children yet. Of course, I plan to make one... &n Oh my! What am I talking about!
1000608536.korean: 후후... 아직 어린이는 없지만요. 물론 만들 계획은... &n어머나! 내가 무슨 말을 하는 거야!

1000608537.english: Okay, I'm going to be out for a bit, so you two should get ready.
1000608537.korean: 자, 잠시 다녀올 때가 있으니 두 분은 준비를 하고 있도록 해요.

1000608538.english: Yeah? Leah, you need to get ready too! Where are you going?
1000608538.korean: 응? 레아도 준비를 해야지! 어딜 가는 거야?

1000608539.english: Still, I need permission from my master to go on a mission. Don't worry. My master won't ignore Momo's love for her friend. So...
1000608539.korean: 그래도 출진을 위해선 주인님께 허락을 맡아야 하니까요.&n걱정 말아요. 주인님은 친구를 아끼는 모모 씨의 마음을 외면하지 않을 거예요. 그럼...

1000608540.english: What? Why are you in such a hurry? Are you planning on making the child I mentioned earlier, or something? And how do you make it?
1000608540.korean: 뭐야? 왜 그렇게 서둘러? &n아까 이야기했던 어린이를 만들 계획하고 관계라도 있는 거야? 그런데 그건 어떻게 만드는 거지?

1000608541.english: No, that can't be true. Besides, tell Triaina.
1000608541.korean: 그, 그럴 리가 없잖아요. 게다가 트리아이나에겐 일러요.

1000608542.english: This time, I'll just get permission quickly and come back... so wait.
1000608542.korean: 이번엔 얼른 허락만 받고 올 테니... 기다리고 있어요.

1000608543.english: Why are you in such a hurry? Oh, right! This isn't the time for this... Then, Momo, should we get ready too? &n For a smooth journey ahead, you need to prepare thoroughly first. Be like your senior and follow me.
1000608543.korean: 왜 저렇게 서두르지? 아 참! 이러고 있을 때가 아니지... 그럼, 모모, 우리도 준비해볼까?&n앞으로의 여행이 편하려면 첫 준비를 꼼꼼하게 해야 된다구. 선배답게 날 따라오도록 해.

1000608544.english: I'm going to gather more members. Some really exciting friends, I mean. Hehe!
1000608544.korean: 난 멤버를 더 모아볼게. 아주 신나는 친구들로 말이야. 히힛!

1000608545.english: - We cleared the area of ​​Metal Parasite in search of a Bioroid called Moonbit. Command was always tense. Only after I defeated the last Metal Parasite was I able to stretch my arms.
1000608545.korean: - 백토라는 바이오로이드의 수색을 위해 우리는 이 일대의 철충을 청소했다.&n지휘는 언제나 긴장의 연속. 난 마지막 철충을 쓰러뜨리고야 팔을 뻗어 기지개를 펼 수 있었다.

1000608546.english: - Come to think of it, it's a rather absurd experience. "Finding a former actress Bioroid" in a ruined world...
1000608546.korean: - 생각해 보면 황당한 경험이긴 하다. &n멸망한 세상에서 '전직 여배우 바이오로이드를 찾는다.' 라니...

1000608547.english: - Well, it's worth it, as it relieves Momo of her emotional burden and adds another powerful Bioroid to the team.
1000608547.korean: - 뭐, 모모가 가진 마음의 짐을 덜 수 있고, &n강력한 바이오로이드 한 명이 더 합류하는 일이니 충분히 가치는 있는 일이다.

1000608548.english: - It's worth it, but this absurd experience is tiring. Now, it's time to rest...
1000608548.korean: - 가치는 있지만 이 황당한 경험에 피곤한 일은 피곤한 것. 이젠 휴식을...

1000608549.english: Yay! Captain!! Can you see it?

1000608550.english: I cancel my previous thought. Considering the adventure I've had with Triaina, this should be normal. I put aside my thoughts about rest for a moment. Now is the time to focus on the report.
1000608550.korean: - 방금했던 생각은 취소한다. 트리아이나와 있었던 모험을 생각하면,&n이 정도 일은 평범한 일이겠지. 잠시 휴식에 대한 생각을 미뤄둔다. 지금은 보고에 집중할 때다.

1000608551.english: Yes, Captain. Then I'll report. I still haven't found any trace of that Bioroid called Moonbit. &n ... By the way, what does Moonbit look like?
1000608551.korean: 넵. 캡틴. 그럼 보고할게. 아직 그 백토라는 바이오로이드의 흔적은 못 찾았어.&n... 그러고 보니, 백토는 어떻게 생겼지?

1000608552.english: What... Even the Captain doesn't know? There's nothing we can do! We have no choice but to use the expedition leader's transcendent intuition to find out! Then I'll continue the search. I'll contact you again if I find anything special!
1000608552.korean: 뭐... 캡틴도 모른다는 거네? 어쩔 수 없지! 탐사 대장의 초월적인 감으로 찾는 수밖에!&n그럼 수색을 계속할게. 특별한 걸 발견하면 다시 연락하겠습니당!

1000608553.english: Triaina ran off without even hearing my answer. &n That guy... If he were in Orca, I would have scolded him... No... Scolding him won't help, so what should I do...
1000608553.korean: - 트리아이나는 내 대답도 듣지 않고 뛰쳐나갔다. &n저 녀석... 오르카에 있었다면 혼내 줬을텐데... 아니... 혼을 내도 소용이 없으니 어찌해야 하나...

1000608554.english: ... Phew... I guess this isn't the right place. &n Okay, everyone? It's time to go back. Doctor, please get ready too.
1000608554.korean: ... 휴... 아무래도 이쪽은 아닌 것 같네요.&n자~ 여러분? 이제 돌아갈 시간이에요. 닥터 씨도 준비해 주세요.

1000608555.english: Huh? You're going back already? Not yet. You can't do that, Unnie.
1000608555.korean: 으응? 벌써 돌아간다구? 아직 안 돼. 그러면 안 돼. 언니.

1000608556.english: I think the Titans will find some traces. It'll only take 10 minutes... &n Huh? Huh?
1000608556.korean: 타이탄이 뭔가 흔적을 찾을 것 같단 말야. 10분만 있으면 되니까...&n응? 응?

1000608557.english: Um... After the search is over... I was ordered to return quickly... So I can't help it. Doctor, can you promise me that you won't stray too far from my sister?
1000608557.korean: 음... 수색을 마치면... 빨리 되돌아오라는 명령이 있었는데... 하는 수 없죠.&n닥터님, 그럼 언니랑 멀리 떨어지지 않는다고 약속해 줄 수 있죠?

1000608558.korean: 물론이지 언니! 그러면, 난 조금 있다가...

1000608560.english: Huh?! You surprised me...! Phantom Unnie?!

1000608561.english: ...I'm going to make a reconnaissance report.

1000608562.english: Next time, turn on your blinkers and come in. Seriously... &n Yeah... So how did the reconnaissance go?
1000608562.korean: 다음부터 깜빡이 좀 켜고 들어와. 정말...&n네... 그럼 정찰은 어떻게 됐어?

1000608563.english: ...There were no special traces. It's been several years, so I might have missed it... &n There's still time, so I'll go take another look.
1000608563.korean: ... 특별한 흔적은 없었다. 몇 년이 지난 흔적이라 내가 놓친 걸 수도 있고...&n아직 시간이 남아있으니까 한 번 더 보고 오도록 하지.

1000608565.english: This isn't for you, it's for your own good. It's a mission...
1000608565.korean: 너, 널 위해 하는 일이 아니다. 임무이기에...

1000608567.english: Phantom? Phantom? Where are you going?

1000608568.korean: 정말... 팬텀님은 혹시 날 싫어하는 걸까요?

1000608569.english: Uh... Is that so? But here I am. This is the first time I've seen Phantom Unnie's face this close. I told you I was really surprised. Phantom Unnie doesn't really like us...
1000608569.korean: 어... 그런 걸까? 근데 나 있지. 팬텀 언니 얼굴을 이렇게 가까이서 보는 건 처음이야. &n정말 깜짝 놀랐다니까? 팬텀 언니는 우리를 별로 안 좋아하니...

1000608573.english: The Commander told me to come here. He said there was something I could help with? What is it? What is it? Teach me quickly!
1000608573.korean: 사령관님이 여기로 가라고 하셨어. 내가 도울 일이 있다면서?&n뭐야? 그게 뭐야? 얼른 가르쳐줘~!

1000608574.english: Uh... that's... &n Wait a minute. Sister...

1000608575.english: Big Brother...? Sister Cerberus came to visit us?

1000608576.english: - ... The Doctor was given a bit of a bothersome task. Cerberus, who usually played with the Doctor, couldn't stand the Doctor going on a mission after a long time.
1000608576.korean: - ... 닥터에겐 조금 귀찮은 일을 맡기게 됐다.&n평소엔 주로 닥터와 노는 켈베로스는 닥터가 오랜만에 임무를 나가자 견디질 못했다.

1000608577.english: - Thanks to that, I had to walk around the ship about 250 times before Momo and her group arrived at the scene...
1000608577.korean: - 덕분에 나는 모모 일행이 현장에 도착할 때까지 &n함 내의 산책을 약 250회 정도 돌아줘야 했고...

1000608578.english: - I had a feeling that my body wouldn't be able to handle this.
1000608578.korean: - 이래서는 내 몸이 버티질 못한다는 걸 직감했다.

1000608579.english: - For both me and Cerberus. Cerberus must go on a quest. &n Cerberus is somewhat similar to a dog, so he's quite talented at questing.
1000608579.korean: - 나와 켈베로스 모두를 위해. 켈베로스는 탐색을 나가야 한다. &n켈베로스는 어쩐지 강아지와 비슷한 면이 있으니 탐색에도 꽤나 재능이 있으니까.

1000608580.english: Really~? Is that so? Maybe so? &n Okay. Then, Cerberus sis! Let's go find the 'thing' together!
1000608580.korean: 정말요~? 그런가? 어쩌면 그럴 지도? &n좋아요. 그럼 켈베언니! 나랑 같이 '물건' 찾으러 가요!

1000608581.english: Yeah! Stuff? What stuff? I like anything! Commander? Then Cerberus! Let's go!
1000608581.korean: 응! 물건? 무슨 물건이야? 난 뭐든 좋아!&n사령관님? 그럼 켈베로스! 출발합니다!

1000608582.english: Okay, wait a minute. Doctor, where are you running to? Didn't I tell you not to leave my sister's side?
1000608582.korean: 자, 잠깐~. 닥터님, 어딜 달려가려는 거예요?&n언니 곁에서 떨어지면 안 된다고 했죠?

1000608583.english: Then you can come too, Big Sis. Hehe. &n I'm looking for something really important right now, right?
1000608583.korean: 그러면 언니도 따라오면 되지. 히히. &n지금 되게 중요한 걸 찾고 있거든?

1000608584.english: If I just have that, I can super-strengthen my brother. &n What. Are. You. Lo?
1000608584.korean: 그것만 있으면 오빠를 엄-청! 강화시킬 수 있다구.&n여. 러. 모. 로?

1000608585.english: - Reinforcement? I've never heard of this before. I feel uneasy.
1000608585.korean: - 강화? 이건 듣지 못한 이야기다. 어쩐지 불안한 마음이 든다.

1000608587.english: Commander, are you getting stronger? Where? How? Alright. Shall we go?
1000608587.korean: 사령관 님이 강화되는 거야? 어디가? 어떻게?&n좋아. 그럼 출발해 볼까?

1000608588.english: Sister~? You have to know what it is~!

1000608589.english: Hehehe! Big Brother? See you later~!

1000608590.english: Oh my! I'll follow you, Commander.

1000608591.english: Because magical girls are supposed to protect children.

1000608592.english: - Even Momo left and the surroundings became quiet.

1000608593.english: - But clearly... you said you were looking for a certain Bioroid... &n I think its name was Moonbit? Momo's companion...
1000608593.korean: - 그런데 분명... 어떤 바이오로이드를 찾는다고 했었는데...&n이름이 백토였나? 모모의 동료...

1000608594.english: - After I confirmed that they were heading towards the safe zone, I decided to take a breather.
1000608594.korean: - 난 그녀들이 안전지대 방향으로 가는 것을 확인한 후, 숨을 돌리기로 했다.

1000608595.english: - Let's put the visor down for a moment...

1000608596.english: - ...Besides this, there are plenty of other tiring things to do.
1000608596.korean: - ... 이것 말고도 피곤한 일은 충분히 많으니까.

1000608597.english: Everyone... seems to be getting along well... &n Me too... Should I have spoken a little more politely?
1000608597.korean: 다들... 사이가 좋아 보이네...&n나도... 조금만 더 붙임성있게 말할 걸 그랬나?

1000608598.english: No. Rather, I need to show my trustworthiness so my sisters will trust me. Cheer up... Next time, they'll definitely ask me to be their friend because they see my trustworthiness.
1000608598.korean: 아니야. 오히려 믿음직한 모습을 보여줘야 자매들도 날 믿을 거야.&n힘내자... 다음엔 분명히 내 믿음직한 모습에 친구가 되자고 할 테니.

1000608599.english: - A message came saying that Momo and her group were returning.

1000608600.english: - However, according to the report, there were no significant results.
1000608600.korean: - 다만, 보고에 의하면 별다른 성과는 없다고 한다.

1000608601.english: - It's been several years already. Perhaps it's only natural.
1000608601.korean: - 벌써 몇 년이나 지났으니. 어쩌면 당연한 결과겠지.

1000608602.english: - But the problem was what happened after the search was announced.
1000608602.korean: - 하지만 문제는 수색 종료를 알린 시점. 그다음에 일어났다.

1000608603.english: - Momo, who had found a very small trace of white clay, insisted on continuing the search, which was unusual for her, and the expected return time was way past.
1000608603.korean: - 백토의 아주 작은 흔적을 찾은 모모가 평소답지 않게 수색을 계속하는 걸 고집하는 바람에&n예상 복귀 시간을 훌쩍 넘겨버린 것이다.

1000608604.english: - Even the doctor, who was so excited to find 'that thing' at first, later turned pale in the face. Momo persistently tried to find traces.
1000608604.korean: - 처음에 그렇게 '그 물건'을 찾겠다고 신이 났던 닥터도 나중에는 얼굴이 하얗게 질릴 만큼.&n모모는 집요하게 흔적을 찾으려 했다.

1000608605.english: Um... Master? I think... I should tell Momoyang... Even though there's no time limit... If he keeps acting like that, shouldn't we stop the search?
1000608605.korean: 저... 주인님? 아무래도... 모모양에겐 이야기를 해두는 게...&n아무리 시간제한을 두진 않았지만... 자꾸 저러면 수색을 중지시켜야 하지 않을까요?

1000608606.english: - ...Constantia seems worried about Momo. &n Shouldn't it be a good idea to warn Momo when she returns?
1000608606.korean: - ... 콘스탄챠는 모모를 걱정하는 것 같다.&n역시 모모가 돌아오면 경고를 해두는 게 좋을까?

1000608609.english: - ... Momo's expression as she reported wasn't very bright.
1000608609.korean: - ... 보고를 알리는 모모의 표정이 그리 밝지 않았다.

1000608610.english: - I was going to scold Momo for making an example of her, but something bothered me, so I briefly searched my memory...
1000608610.korean: - 나는 모모를 본보기로 혼을 내려 했지만, &n어쩐지 마음에 걸리는 게 있어 잠깐 기억을 더듬었다...

1000608611.english: - ...I said it was a Bioroid that was created together...

1000608612.english: - Even though it's called motivation, it definitely feels like an obsession. It's hard to see it as a simple motivation.
1000608612.korean: - 동기라고는 하지만 확실히 집착이 심한 느낌이다.&n단순한 동기라고는 보기는 힘들다.

1000608613.english: - I reached out and glanced at the file next to me. Inside the file, in Momo's pretty handwriting...
1000608613.korean: - 나는 슬쩍 팔을 뻗어, 옆에 있는 파일을 들춰 보았다.&n파일 안에는 모모의 예쁜 필체로...
