1000608615.english: - Friend... It's a word that doesn't really come to me because I don't have any friends. But I guess it's a word that has a lot of meaning to Momo?
1000608615.korean: - 친구라... 친구가 없는 내겐 잘 다가오지 않는 단어다.&n하지만, 모모에겐 큰 의미가 있는 단어라고 봐야겠지?

1000608617.english: Eekung! I'm sorry, Commander... I've been acting strange lately, haven't I? Hehe...
1000608617.korean: 에쿵! 죄송해요 사령관님... 요즘 저 많이 이상하죠? 헤헤...

1000608618.english: Today I really... did something wrong.

1000608619.english: I won't be stubborn or make you worry anymore... I'm truly sorry, Commander. The search will only end today...
1000608619.korean: 앞으로는 고집부리거나 걱정시키지 않을게요... 정말 죄송해요 사령관님.&n수색도 오늘까지만...

1000608620.english: - I was originally worried about whether I should scold her, but I felt so sorry for Momo who was trying so hard to smile.
1000608620.korean: - 본래 혼을 내야 할지 고민을 했던 나였지만&n애써 웃는 모모가 너무 안쓰러워 보였다.

1000608621.english: - Considering Momo's obsession, and the many combat missions she has to perform... I guess I should stop here.
1000608621.korean: - 모모가 보이는 집착을 생각하면, 그리고 수행해야 할 전투 임무가 많은 걸 생각하면...&n여기서 그만둬야 되겠지.

1000608626.english: - It seemed like Constance had something to say, but she never opened her mouth. She was trying to respect my opinion, I guess.
1000608626.korean: - 아무래도 콘스탄챠는 할 말이 있는 것처럼 보였지만&n끝내 입을 열진 않았다. 내 의견을 존중해 주려고 하는 거겠지?

1000608627.english: But... I've already caused trouble to my sisters and the Commander... &n What should I do... Is it really okay to do this?
1000608627.korean: 하지만... 이미 전 자매들과 사령관님께 폐를 끼쳐서...&n저는 어떻게 해야 할지... 정말 그래도 될까요?

1000608628.english: Yes, Commander! I'll definitely bring him. Thank you very much.
1000608628.korean: 네! 사령관님! 꼭 데리고 올게요. 정말 감사해요.

1000608629.english: Momo smiled, and the bridge seemed to light up brightly. "Yeah. I'll figure out the rest if I try. Momo must have reflected on it too...
1000608629.korean: - 모모가 미소 지었고, 함교는 환하게 빛나는 듯했다.&n그래. 나머지 상황이야 내가 노력하면 어떻게든 되겠지. 모모도 반성을 했을 테고...

1000608630.english: Next time, I guess I'll have to get that, right?

1000608632.english: Hehe! That won't do, Commander~. You should have scolded Momo for her misbehaving earlier, right? Actually, scolding her would have been the right thing to do... But since you didn't scold her... I can't give it to you.
1000608632.korean: 에헷! 그건 안돼요 사령관님~. 아깐 나쁜 짓을 한 모모를 혼내셔야 하셨죠?&n사실 혼내는 게 옳은 거였는데... 혼 내질 않으셨으니.. 드릴 수 없어요.

1000608633.english: Instead, Momo will stick close to the Commander's side, and every time you do something good, Momo will praise you one by one.
1000608633.korean: 대신 모모가 사령관님 옆에 꼭 붙어서, 착한 일 하실 때마다&n모모가 옆에서 하나하나 전~부 칭찬해 드릴게요.

1000608634.english: Well then, Commander? Momo will go apologize to her friends~!
1000608634.korean: 그럼, 사령관님? 모모는 다른 친구들에게 사과하러 가볼게요~!

1000608635.english: - Momo turned around, her face sparkling brightly. Even if the world were to end, a magical girl shouldn't cry.
1000608635.korean: - 모모가 하늘하늘 반짝거리며 돌아갔다.&n세상이 멸망해도 마법 소녀가 울상이면 안 되지.

1000608636.english: - ... Okay, then... Now all that's left is...

1000608638.english: If you continue searching, you'll have to reposition your troops... Is that okay? You'll have to plan the operation from the beginning...
1000608638.korean: 계속 수색을 하시면 병력 배치를 바꾸셔야 할 텐데... 괜찮으시겠어요?&n작전 계획을 처음부터 잡으셔야 할 텐데...

1000608640.english: Really... I can't help it. If you do this and harm your master's health, I... &n Next time... I'll definitely stop you. Really.
1000608640.korean: 정말... 어쩔 수 없네요. 그러다가 주인님 건강이라도 해치게 되면 전... &n다음부턴... 꼭 말릴 거예요. 정말로요.

1000608641.english: - Constantia must be saying this out of genuine concern for me on a day when I'm overworked. &n Thank you for putting up with it though.
1000608641.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 과로하는 날 진심으로 걱정해서 하는 말이겠지.&n그래도 참아줘서 고맙다.

1000608642.english: Hehehe. Master, you must have been tired from leading for so long, right? I think it would be good for you to get some rest. I'll take care of it.
1000608642.korean: 후훗. 주인님도 오랫동안 지휘하느라 힘드셨죠?&n주인님도 조금 쉬시는 게 좋을 것 같네요. 제가 모실게요.

1000608643.english: Waiting room 6 minutes ago... Momo came to apologize... &n When Momo... apologized...
1000608643.korean: 6분 전 대기실... 모모가 사과하러 왔었어... &n모모가... 사과할 때...

1000608644.english: We could have just held hands naturally... Then maybe we could have been friends. But why me...
1000608644.korean: 자연스럽게 손을 잡을 수도 있었어... 그러면 우린 친구가 될 수 있었을지도 몰라.&n그런데 난 왜...

1000608645.english: Phew... Is this another failure... Next time for sure... &n .... ?!

1000608646.english: Huh? I heard something... Oh my? Is someone there?
1000608646.korean: 응? 무슨 소리가 들렸는데... 어머? 거기 누구 계셔요?

1000608647.english: This scent... um... feels familiar? Huh? Why can't I see anything...
1000608647.korean: 이 향기는... 음... 익숙한 향기인데? 응? 어째서 아무것도 안 보이는 걸까...

1000608650.english: Hehe, no, don't worry about it, Mr. Phantom.
1000608650.korean: 우훗, 아녜요 신경 쓰실 것 없어요. 팬텀 씨.

1000608651.english: But... um...? Mr. Phantom? That perfume...
1000608651.korean: 그런데... 음...? 팬텀 씨? 그 향수는...

1000608652.english: ...Perfume... I don't think it will interfere much with the mission.
1000608652.korean: ... 향수... 이, 임무 수행엔 별로 방해가 되지 않을 거라고 생각한다만.

1000608653.english: Hehehe... Yes, I know that too.

1000608654.english: It's a popular perfume among kids these days, right? Everyone seems to be really interested in that perfume.
1000608654.korean: 요즘 아이들 사이에서 인기가 많은 향수죠?&n다들 그 향수에 정말 관심이 많더라고요.

1000608655.english: I thought even the blunt Mr. Phantom would use it... People around him would compliment it on its nice scent.
1000608655.korean: 무뚝뚝한 팬텀 씨도 쓰고 있을 줄이야... 주변에서 향기가 좋다고 칭찬했겠어요.

1000608656.english: W-what... No colleague approaches me so lightly. So...
1000608656.korean: 무, 무슨... 내게 그렇게 가볍게 다가올 동료는 없다. 그러니...

1000608657.english: Hmm~. As expected... Is my overly strict attitude the problem? Or is my poor conversation skills the problem? &n I'm sure Mr. Phantom wants to be close to his sisters too...
1000608657.korean: 흐으음~. 역시... 너무 엄격한 태도가 문제이려나? 서툰 대화 스킬이 문제이려나...&n팬텀 씨도 분명히 자매들과 친하게 지내고 싶으실 텐데...

1000608658.english: I'm not really interested in that kind of thing...

1000608659.english: Hehehe. Okay. Mr. Phantom? Would you like to hear my story?
1000608659.korean: 후훗. 좋아.&n팬텀 씨? 제 이야기 한번 들어 보실래요?

1000608660.english: Orca Do you remember the Bioroid that was always singing alone somewhere? &n Probably... he liked to wear white clothes.
1000608660.korean: 오르카 어디선가 늘 혼자서 노래를 부르고 있던 바이오로이드 기억나시죠?&n아마... 흰색 옷을 즐겨 입었죠.

1000608662.english: Yes. It's Ms. Neodym. It seems she's also going on this sortie with Ms. Momo.
1000608662.korean: 네. 네오딤 씨예요.&n그녀도 이번 출격에 모모 씨를 따라서 같이 출격하는 모양이더라구요.

1000608663.english: I heard you applied purely because you wanted to help Momo...
1000608663.korean: 순수하게 모모 씨를 돕고 싶어서 지원했다고 들었는데...

1000608664.english: I heard that Ms. Neodym doesn't have many friends. She's not very talkative... How about taking this opportunity to become close with her? It wouldn't be a bad idea, right?
1000608664.korean: 네오딤 씨도 친구가 많지는 않다고 들었어요. 말수도 적은 편이고...&n어때요? 이번 기회에 그녀와 한번 친해져 보는 건? 나쁘지 않죠?

1000608665.english: I'd like to help, but... I'm going because I want to become friends...
1000608665.korean: 도움을 줄 생각은 있지만... 친해지고 싶어서 가는 건...

1000608666.english: First of all... I'll go and see.

1000608667.english: I hope this helps Mr. Phantom.
1000608667.korean: 이 일이 팬텀 씨에게 도움이 되었으면 좋겠네요.

1000608668.english: Well then... shall I go see my beloved younger siblings? Next time... let's go see it together, Mr. Phantom~!
1000608668.korean: 그럼... 전 사랑하는 동생들을 보러 가볼까요?&n다음엔... 친구와 같이 봐요. 팬텀 씨~!

1000608669.english: ...Your name was Phantom, right? What happened?

1000608670.english: Hey, I heard this mission is tough. So...
1000608670.korean: 이, 임무가 힘들다는 이야기를 들었다. 그래서...

1000608672.english: Ah... no. I guess I interrupted you. Sorry...
1000608672.korean: 아... 아니다. 아무래도 방해를 한 것 같군. 미안... 하다.

1000608676.english: I get it. Is Phantom uncomfortable with me? Lacey said so. It gets awkward when you're around people who are uncomfortable with you. I'm not uncomfortable with Phantom, so Phantom must be uncomfortable with me.
1000608676.korean: 알 것 같아. 팬텀은 내가 불편한 거야? 레이시가 그랬어. 불편한 사람끼리 있으면&n어색해진다고. 난 팬텀이 불편하지 않으니까 팬텀은 내가 불편한 거겠지.

1000608677.english: Oh, no, that's not it. I just...
1000608677.korean: 아, 아니, 그렇진 않다. 난 그저...

1000608679.english: Ugh... I don't know. What should I say? ... I'm sorry.
1000608679.korean: 윽... 모르겠다. 무슨 말을 해야 하는지. ... 미안하다.

1000608680.english: Phantom... apologizes to me a lot?

1000608681.english: Oh, does Phantom want to help Momo?
1000608681.korean: 아, 혹시 팬텀은 모모를 돕고 싶은 거야?

1000608683.english: I came here to help Momo. The Commander gave me permission.
1000608683.korean: 난 모모를 돕고 싶어서 왔어. 사령관도 허락해 줬고.

1000608685.english: Yeah. One day, Momo would listen to my songs and teach me how to sing.
1000608685.korean: 응. 언젠가 모모는 노래를 잘 들어주고... 노래도 가르쳐 주니까.

1000608691.english: I, I don't know the song. But...

1000608693.english: I might be confident... when it comes to... listening to music...
1000608693.korean: 노래를... 듣는 일엔... 자신이 있을 지도...

1000608696.english: Cerberus found traces of white clay! Let's go see it together!
1000608696.korean: 켈베로스님이 백토의 흔적을 찾았대요! 같이 보러 가요!

1000608698.english: ...Phantom? What was that you were going to say earlier? Do you like listening to music? But... what's next? What?
1000608698.korean: ... 팬텀? 아까 하려던 말... 뭐야? 노래를 듣는 거 좋아해? 그런데 친... 다음은? 뭐야?

1000608700.english: Neodym, go first... I... have something to take with me...
1000608700.korean: 네오딤은 먼저 가 있도록... 난... 따로 가져갈게 있어서...

1000608701.english: Yeah. I'll help Momo. Be careful.
1000608701.korean: 응. 모모는 내가 돕고 있을게. 조심해서 와.

1000608703.english: Why are you hiding and looking over there? Aha! Are you trying to steal the treasure you found? A pirate? A War Wolf's companion?
1000608703.korean: 왜 숨어서 저길 보는 거야? 아하! 혹시 보물을 찾으면 그걸 가로채려고 하는 거야?&n해적? 워울프의 동료야?

1000608705.english: Haha... I got you. You bastard. Even if you pretend not to know, you can't fool me.
1000608705.korean: 후후... 잡았다. 요놈.&n모른 척해봐야 내 눈은 속일 수 없다구.

1000608706.english: Conspiracy is also a form of exploration... Let's consider it as helping the Phantom who is plotting.
1000608706.korean: 음모도 탐험의 일종이니... 음모를 꾸미는 팬텀을 도와주는 셈 치고,

1000608707.english: This Triaina will be your companion. By the way, the distribution is 6:4.
1000608707.korean: 이 트리아이나가 동료가 되어주지. 참고로 분배는 6:4야.

1000608708.english: Oh, no. I think there's a misunderstanding...
1000608708.korean: 아, 아니. 뭔가 오해한 것 같은데...

1000608709.english: I'm not a pirate... I don't intend to plunder...

1000608711.english: Uh... wait a minute! Phantom? Phantom?

1000608712.english: ...Huh? Why? After all... Shouldn't the distribution ratio have been 5:5?
1000608712.korean: ... 어? 어째서? 역시... 분배 비율은 5:5로 해야 했나?

1000608713.english: - I was able to hear the good news that traces of 'Moonbit' were found from Momo.
1000608713.korean: - 모모에게서 '백토'의 흔적을 찾았다는 반가운 소식을 들을 수 있었다.

1000608714.english: - Was it because the show was going smoothly? Momo and her friends were all smiling brightly on screen.
1000608714.korean: - 순조로운 진행 덕분일까? 화면에 비친 모모 일행은 하나같이 밝게 웃고 있었다.

1000608715.english: Yes, Commander. Can you hear me?

1000608716.english: It's not far from the initial exploration area.
1000608716.korean: 최초 탐색 구역에서 멀리 떨어지지 않은 곳이에요.

1000608717.english: Thank you so much, Commander. &n Thanks to your permission to expand the search, we were able to find it.
1000608717.korean: 정말 고마워요. 사령관님.&n사령관님이 확장 수색을 허락해 주셔서 이렇게 찾을 수 있었어요.

1000608718.english: Look! Looks like Moonbit passed by here.

1000608719.english: Commander? Can you see this mark, Commander?

1000608720.english: - The tree Momo pointed to had deep pit marks all over it.
1000608720.korean: - 모모가 가리킨 나무에는 깊게 팬 자국들이 여기저기 나 있었다.

1000608721.english: Wow~! Looks like Moonbit used 'Pink Moon Light' here!
1000608721.korean: 우와~! 백토가 여기서 '핑크 문 라이트'를 사용했나 봐요!

1000608722.english: Magical Pink Moonlight. Moonbit's favorite magic wand.
1000608722.korean: 매지컬 핑크 문 라이트. 백토가 가장 아끼는 마술 봉이죠.

1000608723.english: Pink Moon Light~! If you summon it with Magical attached, its magic power will become stronger?
1000608723.korean: 핑크 문 라이트~! 매지컬을 붙여서 불러주시면 마력이 더 강해진답니다?

1000608727.english: Hmm... Yes, there is~ Unnie, Unnie.

1000608728.english: I want to hear your opinion, sister.

1000608729.english: Sister, do you think there is magic in this world?
1000608729.korean: 언니는 이 세상에 마법이 있다고 생각해?

1000608731.english: Hehe. If... there really is magic, then I'm going to analyze it and do something with it. I'm looking for some magic items right now, right?
1000608731.korean: 히히. 만약에 말야... 마법이 진짜 있다면, 그걸 분석한 뒤에 뭘 좀 할 생각이야.&n지금 그 마법이 담긴 물품을 좀 찾고 있거든?

1000608732.english: Ugh~! Just imagining it makes me so happy~.

1000608733.english: ...I learned there's no such thing as magic. It's just superstition...
1000608733.korean: ... 난 마법 같은 건 없다고 배웠어. 그냥 미신이라고...

1000608734.korean: 우음, 안 돼 안 돼 언니.

1000608735.english: By the way, it is said that a scientific explorer must be free from bias.
1000608735.korean: 참고로 과학의 탐구자는 편견이 없어야 한다구.

1000608736.english: Really? &n ... If the doctor says so, I'll think about it again.
1000608736.korean: 그래?&n... 닥터가 그렇다면 다시 한번 생각해 볼게.

1000608737.english: But what does the Doctor want to do when he gains magical powers?
1000608737.korean: 그런데. 닥터는 마법의 힘을 얻으면 뭘 하고 싶은 거야?

1000608738.english: Yes, if I could use magic, I could control my brother's mind... and make him think I'm an adult... Hehehe.
1000608738.korean: 난 있지, 마법을 다룰 수 있게 되면&n오빠의 정신을... 조종해서 날 어른으로 생각하게... 흐흐흐.

1000608739.english: It's not fun if I tell you in advance, so I'll stop here.

1000608740.english: Doctor, do you want to be an adult?

1000608741.english: Of course. My brother keeps treating this genius like a child! If I were an adult, I would treat him more 'hihi'... like I treat War Wolf or Sister Alexandra.
1000608741.korean: 당연하지. 오빠는 이 천재를 계속 어린애처럼 대한다구!&n어른이라면 좀 더 '히힛'하게 대할 텐데... 워울프나 알렉산드라 언니를 대하는 것처럼 말야.

1000608743.english: Huh? Why are you suddenly using a communicator... &n No way? No, sis! Don't do that~.
1000608743.korean: 응? 왜 갑자기 통신기를...&n설마? 안돼 언니! 그러지 마~.

1000608745.english: - I have absolutely no idea what the context of your question is. Why is this story suddenly...
1000608745.korean: - 질문의 맥락을 전혀 알 수 없다. 갑자기 이 이야기가 왜...

1000608746.english: Ugh... what if I tell you that?

1000608747.english: Tch. It's all my fault. Because he only likes older sisters... &n Last time, Alexandra, Marie, and I locked the door and played alone together...
1000608747.korean: 칫. 이게 다 오빠 때문이야. 오빠가 어른 언니들만 좋아하니까...&n저번에도 알렉산드라 언니랑, 마리 언니랑 문 잠그고 셋이서만 놀았으니까...

1000608748.english: - Three people's gazes are fixed on me. In particular, Neodym's innocent gaze hurts. &n Damn, how did you know that?
1000608748.korean: - 세 명의 시선이 꽂힌다. 특히, 네오딤의 순진한 시선이 아프다.&n제길, 그걸 어떻게 안 거지?

1000608749.english: Commander, do you like adults? Neodym is an adult too. Commander, do you like Neodym too?
1000608749.korean: 사령관은 어른이 좋아? 네오딤도 어른이야. 사령관, 네오딤도 좋아하지?

1000608750.english: Doctor, the Commander doesn't only like adults. &n Isn't it true that Momo was able to be loved by the Commander with magical powers?
1000608750.korean: 닥터님, 사령관님은 어른만 좋아하는 건 아니에요.&n저 모모는 마법의 힘으로 사령관님께 사랑받을 수 있었던걸요?

1000608753.english: Really? Is what Momo said true? Big Brother, it doesn't matter if I'm not an adult, right? You love children too, right?
1000608753.korean: 정말? 모모 언니 말이 사실이야? 오빠, 어른이 아니라도 상관없는 거지?&n어린아이도 사랑하는 거지?

1000608754.english: Of course! Magic makes everything possible.
1000608754.korean: 물론이죠! 마법의 힘은 모든 걸 가능하게 하니까요.

1000608755.english: I want to use magic to be loved by my brother too! &n How do you use magic? Do you know mind control magic well?
1000608755.korean: 나도 마법을 써서 오빠한테 사랑받을래!&n마법은 어떻게 쓰는 거지? 정신 조작 마법도 잘 알아?

1000608756.english: - You must answer carefully. The Doctor's words could lead to serious misunderstandings. &n Besides... the Doctor's advanced scientific technology is practically magic.
1000608756.korean: - 대답을 잘 해야 한다. 닥터의 말은 큰 오해를 불러일으킬 수 있다. &n게다가... 닥터의 발달된 과학 기술은 마법이나 다름없다.

1000608758.english: Ah! That's right! Shall we all go? We'll be meeting Moonbit soon, so please welcome him when you see him~.
1000608758.korean: 아! 맞아요! 모두 출발해 볼까요? 곧 있으면 백토를 만나게 될 텐데,&n백토를 보면 모두 환영해 주세요~.

1000608759.english: That's right! Sister Moonbit used magic too, right? That's great! I have a ton of questions to ask.
1000608759.korean: 맞아! 백토 언니도 마법을 쓴댔지? 잘 됐어! 물어볼 게 산더미 같은걸?

1000608760.english: There are so many fun things in the world, I'm so happy~. &n Big Brother, get ready to love me now!
1000608760.korean: 세상엔 재밌는 게 많아서 너무 행복해~.&n오빠, 이제 날 사랑할 준비를 하고 있으라고!

1000608761.english: ...I thought I could get in this time...
1000608761.korean: ... 이번엔 낄 수 있을 것 같았는데...

1000608762.english: - A black-haired girl with rabbit ears.

1000608763.english: - The girl was alone, beating up the remaining Metal Parasites while keeping her distance from us.
1000608763.korean: - 그 소녀는 우리와 거리를 둔 채로 잔존한 철충들을 홀로 때려 부수고 있었다.

1000608764.english: - It seems like that girl has no intention of approaching me rashly.
1000608764.korean: - 아무래도, 저 소녀는 섣불리 다가올 생각이 없는 것 같다.

1000608765.english: - The girl Momo was looking for. Is that girl Moonbit?
1000608765.korean: - 모모가 그렇게 찾던 그 소녀. 저 소녀가 그 백토인가?

1000608766.english: You've been here! It's been... really long time, Moonbit!

1000608768.english: Where are you hurt? Are you feeling okay? Was it hard fighting all this time?
1000608768.korean: 다친 곳은? 몸은 괜찮아? 그동안 싸우느라 힘들었지?

1000608774.english: ...I'm still not sure if you're the real Magical Momo.
1000608774.korean: ... 난 아직 네가 진짜 매지컬 모모인지 확신이 서지 않아.

1000608775.english: Contrary to expectations, the atmosphere is tense. Is there something wrong between the two?
1000608775.korean: - 예상과 달리, 분위기가 심상치 않다. 두 사람 사이에 무슨 문제라도 있는 걸까?

1000608776.english: Hehe. It must have been hard for you to fight alone until now, Moonbit.
1000608776.korean: 헤헤. 여태 백토 혼자서 싸우느라 많이 힘들었지?

1000608777.english: There is no need to search for the 'Faucre Demon King' anymore.
1000608777.korean: 이젠 더 이상 '뽀끄루 대마왕'을 찾아다닐 필요 없어.

1000608778.english: The 'Faucre Demon King' that Moonbit was chasing was all staged... no. &n an imaginary being.
1000608778.korean: 백토가 쫓던 '뽀끄루 대마왕'은 모두 연출된... 아니.&n허상의 존재야.

1000608779.english: In the end, it was revealed that the Demon King Faucre was a fake, so Moonbit no longer had to wander alone.
1000608779.korean: 마지막에 뽀끄루 대마왕이 가짜라는 게 밝혀졌으니,&n더 이상 백토 혼자서 헤맬 필요 없어.

1000608780.english: Now, our magical girls must join forces and fight against a new enemy.
1000608780.korean: 이제 우리 마법소녀들은 힘을 합쳐서, 새로운 적과 맞서 싸워야만 해.

1000608781.english: I see... Is that so? I thought it was the real Momo because I didn't feel any evil magic... &n Did Faucre say it was an illusion?
1000608781.korean: 역시... 그런가? 사악한 마법이 느껴지지 않아서 진짜 모모라고 생각했더니...&n뽀끄루가 허상이라고 했나?

1000608784.english: I'm sorry, Momo. I can't hold your hand.
1000608784.korean: 미안하군. 모모. 난 너와 손을 잡을 수 없어.

1000608785.english: Because the Demon King Faucre is still alive, and you are a liar.
1000608785.korean: 왜냐면 뽀끄루 대마왕은 아직 살아있고,&n넌 거짓말쟁이니까.

1000608787.english: That look... Are you brainwashed too? &n Hmph! What a disappointment. To think your mental strength was so weak...
1000608787.korean: 그 눈빛은... 결국 너마저 세뇌된 건가?&n흥! 실망이군. 네 정신력이 이토록 약했다니...

1000608788.english: Unfortunately, that's the end of the story... &n There's no use telling you more.
1000608788.korean: 아쉽지만, 이야기는 여기까지야...&n더 들려줘 봐야 소용없겠지.

1000608789.english: Okay, wait a minute. Where are you going?

1000608790.english: ...If, as you say, Faucre is an illusion.

1000608791.english: I must go and cut down even that illusion...

1000608795.english: What did the two of them talk about?
1000608795.korean: 두 사람은... 무슨 이야기를 한 걸까?

1000608797.english: Tch. I thought I'd see magic this time. Everyone just walked away.
1000608797.korean: 칫. 이번엔 마법을 볼 수 있을 줄 알았는데. 다들 그냥 가버렸어.

1000608798.english: Well, anyway, I've attached a microbot to Unnie Moonbit, so it'll help Unnie Momo track her.
1000608798.korean: 뭐, 어쨌든 백토 언니한텐 마이크로봇을 하나 붙여놨으니까, &n모모 언니가 추적하는 데 도움이 될 거야.

1000608799.english: Big Brother? I'll go find Momo. Don't forget the magic of love.
1000608799.korean: 오빠? 난 모모 언니 찾으러 갈게. 사랑의 마법을 잊지 마.

1000608801.english: Um... Should I go too? I want to help...
1000608801.korean: 음... 나도 가야 해? 돕고 싶은데...

1000608802.english: - First of all... all the surrounding Metal Parasites have disappeared. There doesn't seem to be any major danger to Momona or the Doctor.
1000608802.korean: - 일단... 주위의 철충은 모두 사라진 상태다. 모모나 닥터에게 큰 위험은 없어 보인다.

1000608803.english: - I don't think Neodym, who is awkward at conversation, will be of much help... &n It seems like there is a misunderstanding between Momo and Moonbit that needs to be resolved.
1000608803.korean: - 아무래도 대화에 서툰 네오딤이 큰 도움이 될 것 같지는 않고... &n모모와 백토에겐 풀어야 할 오해가 있는 것 같다.

1000608805.english: So what should we do? Commander, should I sing the song I learned from Brownie yesterday?
1000608805.korean: 그럼 뭐 할까? 사령관 어제 브라우니한테 배운 노래 불러줄까?

1000608806.english: I like fried onions, I like onions because they taste good.
1000608806.korean: 기름에 튀긴 양파가 좋다네, 맛있으니까 양파가 좋다네.

1000608807.english: I like fried onions, I like onions, I like onions.
1000608807.korean: 기름에 튀긴 양파가 좋다네, 양파가 좋다네, 양파가 좋다네.

1000608808.english: Brownie taught me. He said if I sang this song well, the commander would like it...
1000608808.korean: 브라우니가 가르쳐 줬어. 이 노래를 잘 부르면 사령관이 좋아할 거랬는데...

1000608809.english: Should I sing a different song? What song should I sing that will make the Commander love me?
1000608809.korean: 다른 노래를 불러야 하나?&n무슨 노래를 부르면 사령관은 사랑해 줄 거야?

1000608810.english: I know. Last night in the Commander's room, Constance said she loved him...
1000608810.korean: 알고 있어. 어젯밤에 사령관 방에서 콘스탄챠가 사랑한다고 말하면서...

1000608811.english: Brownie taught me the secret point. I saw it there.
1000608811.korean: 브라우니가 시크릿 포인트를 가르쳐 줬어. 거기서 봤어.

1000608812.english: Huh? Why are you mad? Did Brownie do something wrong? &n ... maybe... did I do something wrong too?
1000608812.korean: 응? 왜 화내? 브라우니 잘못한 거야? &n... 혹시... 나도 잘못한 거?

1000608813.english: - Somehow, a look of concern appeared in Neodym's eyes. &n Brownie, this guy... What did you teach this innocent child!
1000608813.korean: - 어쩐지 네오딤의 눈에 걱정하는 빛이 떠오른다.&n브라우니 이 녀석... 이 순진한 아이한테 뭘 가르친 거야!

1000608815.english: Then, if we continue to the secret point...

1000608816.english: ...It won't work... But why? I love you...

1000608819.english: Huh? Phantom? When did you get here?

1000608820.english: "Look, I've come to report. Your Majesty, Momo and Hakuto are talking for now. The Doctor... seems to be looking for something."
1000608820.korean: 보, 보고를 위해서 왔다. 사령관 각하, 일단, 모모와 백토는 이야기를 나누고 있습니다.&n닥터는... 무언가를 찾고 있는 것으로 보입니다.

1000608823.english: Oh, you're so affectionate! How rude, how rude.

1000608824.english: I'm in the position of protecting three people...

1000608825.english: I want to protect you too. Should I go now?

1000608826.english: Oh, no! You... stay back. You can't leave here... &n Yeah, right. You'll be a nuisance to them. Here, for now...
1000608826.korean: 아, 안돼! 넌... 뒤로 물러서 있어 여기를 떠나서는...&n그, 그래. 그들에게 방해가 될 거다. 여기에 일단...

1000608828.english: ... Sorry... Then... I'll go over there and stay still.
1000608828.korean: ... 미안... 그럼... 난 저기 가서 가만히 있을게.

1000608829.english: Wait... Huh! Why am I... again?

1000608830.english: I just wanted to show myself as somewhat trustworthy...
1000608830.korean: 그냥 좀 믿음직한 모습을 보여주고 싶었던 건데...

1000608831.english: Yes... Yes? Oh, no. That's not for a warrior...
1000608831.korean: 네... 네? 아, 아닙니다. 전사에게 그런 건...

1000608832.english: - Something about him feels like an outsider. Phantom, this kid... what on earth does he want?
1000608832.korean: - 뭔가 아웃사이더의 느낌이 온다. 팬텀 이 아이는... 도대체 무엇을 원하는 걸까?

1000608833.english: - By any chance... were you trying to approach Neodym with a trustworthy image of protecting him?
1000608833.korean: - 혹시... 네오딤을 보호하는 믿음직한 이미지로 다가가려고 한 건가?

1000608836.english: - Phantom is screaming. Well... let's just leave it alone for now... &n Please... Moonbit and Momo's situation needs to be resolved...
1000608836.korean: - 팬텀은 절규하고 있다. 뭐... 일단은 내버려 두고... &n부디... 백토와 모모의 일이 잘 해결돼야 할 텐데...

1000608837.english: - Momo ultimately failed to chase after Moonbit, and returned to Orca in despair. Momo must have been heartbroken to have their reunion after several years broken in that way.
1000608837.korean: - 모모는 결국 백토를 쫓는데 실패하고, 풀이 죽어 오르카로 복귀했다.&n몇 년 만의 재회가 그런 식으로 깨져버려, 모모도 크게 상심했겠지.

1000608838.english: - A warm wind blew from somewhere, and Leah appeared and hugged Momo affectionately.
1000608838.korean: - 어디선가 따뜻한 바람이 불더니, 레아가 나타나 모모를 다정하게 안아주었다.

1000608839.english: ...What should I do now? Moonbit... doesn't believe me. He keeps saying that the Demon King Faucre summoned the Iron Insects... and that I've been brainwashed...
1000608839.korean: ... 이제 어쩌죠? 백토가... 제 말을 믿지 않아요.&n자꾸 뽀끄루 대마왕이 철충들을 불러왔다고 하면서... 전 세뇌됐다고...

1000608841.english: If we leave it like that, Moonbit will be in danger...
1000608841.korean: 저렇게 내버려 두면 백토가 위험할 텐데...

1000608842.english: Momo? Then, shall we try this this time?
1000608842.korean: 모모 씨? 그러면, 우리 이번에는 이렇게 해볼까요?

1000608844.english: For now... we'll adjust to Mr. Moonbit.
1000608844.korean: 일단은... 우리가 백토 씨에게 맞춰 주는 거예요

1000608845.english: And, little by little... we try to change Mr. Moonbit's behavior.
1000608845.korean: 그리고, 아주 조금씩... 백토씨의 행동을 변화시켜보는 거죠.

1000608847.english: Moonbit will perceive all magical girls other than those he acknowledges as ordinary people, and will not treat them at all.
1000608847.korean: 백토는 자신이 인정한 마법소녀들 외에는 전부 일반인들로 인식하고,&n아예 상대해주지 않을 거예요.

1000608848.english: Don't worry about that. I have a good solution.
1000608848.korean: 그건 걱정 말아요. 제게 좋은 해결책이 있어요.

1000608849.english: If Moonbit-ssi treats us like normal people...then we can transform into magical girls, right?
1000608849.korean: 백토씨가 우릴 일반인처럼 여긴다면...&n우리가 마법소녀로 변신하면 되겠죠?

1000608850.english: Do you remember 'August Full Moon' where Mr. Moonbit appeared?

1000608852.english: We're going to be the new 4-member magical girls of 'August Full Moon Night'! Isn't that awesome?
1000608852.korean: 우리가 '8월의 만월야'의 새로운 4인조 마법 소녀가 되는 거예요!&n정말 멋지지 않나요?

1000608854.english: Excuse me? &n Leah? Leah? I have a question!

1000608856.english: No matter how much I think about it, the idea of ​​a 'four-member magical girl' seems a bit odd...
1000608856.korean: 아무리 생각해봐도 '4인조 마법 소녀'는 뭔가 이상한 것 같아...

1000608857.english: Isn't Leia more of a 'magical lady' than a 'magical girl'?

1000608858.korean: ... 그렇게 생각할 수도... 있겠... 네요... 호호...

1000608859.english: - ... My hair stood on end for a moment. If there's no other reason, this is clearly a sign of a "discharge phenomenon."
1000608859.korean: - ... 순간 머리털이 곤두섰다. 그럴만한 다른 이유가 없다면 이 현상은 분명&n... '방전 현상'의 징조다.

1000608860.english: Magic Lady...? No. &n Hmm... Compromise... Magic Student? Hahaha! That's a name that sounds like someone who would be good at studying!
1000608860.korean: 마법 레이디...? 아니야. &n흐음... 절충해서... 마법 학생? 아하하! 공부 잘할 것 같은 이름이야!

1000608862.english: Phew... Thank you so much, Master. I didn't realize it...
1000608862.korean: 휴우... 정말 고마워요 주인님. 저도 모르게 그만...

1000608863.english: Hey, Leia? Could you please continue the story of the new four-member magical girl group?
1000608863.korean: 저기, 레아님? 새로운 4인조 마법소녀 이야기를 계속해 주시겠어요?

1000608864.english: Oh my~ Come on, come on... Hehe... I'm sorry, Momo... Then I'll tell you again.
1000608864.korean: 어머~ 내 정신 좀 봐... 후후... 미안해요 모모 씨... 그럼 다시 들려드릴게요.

1000608865.english: Magical girl... the magical girl that everyone admires.

1000608866.english: Let me ask you a question. What is the first thing you need to become a magical girl?
1000608866.korean: 여기서 질문드릴게요. 마법소녀가 되려면 첫 번째로 무엇이 필요할까요?

1000608868.english: Correct! Without a doubt, Momo is the best magical girl.
1000608868.korean: 정답! 의심할 필요 없이 모모 씨는 최고의 마법소녀에요.

1000608869.english: - I see. Being a magical girl is a profession that requires mental strength.
1000608869.korean: - 그랬군. 마법소녀라는 건 정신력이 요구되는 직업이었다.

1000608870.english: Okay then...! What's the second thing we need?
1000608870.korean: 자~ 그럼...! 두 번째로 필요한 건 무엇일까요?

1000608871.english: Ah~! That's such an easy question. The answer would be gorgeous, cute outfits.
1000608871.korean: 아~! 너무 쉬운 질문이군요. 정답은 고저스, 큐티한 복장이겠죠.

1000608872.english: Did I get it right? Hehe... &n As expected~ This is much more fun than just sipping tea at a boutique.
1000608872.korean: 제가 맞췄죠? 후후...&n역~시~ 부띠끄에서 차를 홀짝이는 것보단, 이쪽이 훨씬 재밌겠군요.

1000608873.english: Audrey? You're welcome. I have an urgent favor to ask...
1000608873.korean: 오드리? 마침 잘 오셨어요. 급히 부탁드리고 싶은 게 있는데...

1000608874.english: Ahem~. Between us... let's stop this boring greeting. &n But... you said please, right? Hurry up and call me.
1000608874.korean: 으흠~. 우리 사이에... 따분한 인사는 그만둬요.&n그보다... 부탁이랬죠? 어서... 불러주세요.

1000608875.english: Thank you always, Audrey. Well... let's get started.

1000608876.english: First of all... I'll wear it.

1000608878.english: And, it is a traditional costume related to rabbits.

1000608880.english: Lastly... there has to be magic involved.

1000608882.english: - Audrey took out a set of clothes from the portable wardrobe she had brought.
1000608882.korean: - 오드리는 가져온 이동식 옷장에서 옷을 한 벌 꺼냈다.

1000608883.english: A classic rabbit-like outfit... &n Magic that grabs the attention of those around you and instills passion in the hearts of those who watch!
1000608883.korean: 토끼를 연상시키는 클래식한 복장...&n주변의 시선을 당기고, 구경한 사람들의 마음에 열정을 불어넣는 매직!

1000608884.english: Take it. Yours~! Hehe... I prepared it for you.
1000608884.korean: 받으세요. 유얼즈~! 후후... 당신을 위해 준비했죠.

1000608885.english: - That's strange. That outfit was so different from the magical girl outfits I knew.
1000608885.korean: - 이상하다. 저 옷은 내가 알던 마법소녀 복장과 너무 달랐다.

1000608886.english: As the Commander said... it seems a little different. I don't know for sure. Hmm...
1000608886.korean: 사령관님 말씀대로... 조금 다른 것 같긴 하지만. 저도 잘 모르니까. 음...

1000608887.english: - The magical girl ended up keeping her mouth shut.

1000608888.english: Haha, I know. It's a bit different from a magical girl costume... &n This costume is inspired by traditional costumes worn during holidays in this land in the past.
1000608888.korean: 후후 알고 있어요. 마법소녀 복장과는 조금 디퍼런트... &n이 옷은 과거 이 땅에 존재했던 명절에 입던 전통 의상을 모티브로 제작한 코스튬이죠.

1000608889.english: Yes. Looking through some old records, I found that the people here used to hold a festive party on the night of the full moon in the eighth month of the lunar calendar.
1000608889.korean: 네. 과거의 자료를 좀 살펴보니 이곳의 사람들은 음력 8월의 보름달이 뜬 날, &n명절 파튀를 했다고 하더군요.

1000608890.english: I couldn't find any information about the traditional holiday attire, so I focused on the fact that it was a festival related to the moon rabbit. Looking at the costumes in various magazines...
1000608890.korean: 그 전통 명절의 옷에 대해선 자료를 찾을 수가 없어서...&n달 토끼와 관련된 축제라는 점에 착안했죠. 여러 잡지에 나오는 코스튬을 보면...

1000608891.english: This outfit looks like the traditional holiday attire of this land. What do you think of this traditional cloth, restored using both inspiration and my own sense?
1000608891.korean: 이 옷이 바로 이 땅의 명절 전통복으로 보여요. &n인스퍼레이션과 제 센스 모두를 동원해 복원한 트래디쇼날 클로스, 어떤가요?

1000608892.english: Hehehe, I knew it. &n Okay~ Okay~! There's no time for this. I told you I needed a few more outfits, right?
1000608892.korean: 후훗, 그럴 줄 알았어요.&n자~ 자~! 이러고 있을 시간이 없어요. 복장이 몇 벌 더 필요하다고 했었죠?

1000608893.english: Everyone here? I invite you to my boutique. Follow me.
1000608893.korean: 여기 계신 모두들? 제 부띠크로 초대할게요. 절 따라 오세요.

1000608895.english: Yes~! If it's a four-person magical girl group, I'll be the doctor, right?
1000608895.korean: 예~! 4인조 마법 소녀면, 내가 박사 역할이겠네?

1000608896.english: Wait, sisters~! The doctor is here!

1000608898.english: Ah... this sinful body... &n One devil calls another devil... and another devil seeks a scapegoat.
1000608898.korean: 아아... 이 죄 많은 몸...&n마는 또 다른 마를 부르고... 또 다른 마는 희생양을 찾는구나.

1000608899.english: Moonbit, were you also led by Ma?

1000608901.english: There's nowhere for you to run!

1000608902.english: Foolish... Those who see the devil should try not to be tainted by the devil... &n You... have already been tainted by the devil.
1000608902.korean: 어리석은... 마를 보는 자는 마에 물들지 않도록 노력해야 하거늘...&n넌... 이미 마에 물들었구나.

1000608903.english: It's no use trying to bewitch me! Moon! Give me your magic power! Pink Moonlight!
1000608903.korean: 날 미혹하려 해도 소용없다!&n달이여! 내게 마법의 힘을! 핑크 문 라이트!

1000608904.english: ...it's not time for you to face my horse yet.
1000608904.korean: ... 아직 넌 나의 마에 맞설 시간이 아니야.

1000608906.english: Stand right there! Faucre the Demon King!!!!!

1000608908.english: We've finally woken up from our delusion! Mr. Moonbit! We'll become new magical girls and join you!
1000608908.korean: 드디어 우린 미혹에서 깨어났어요!&n백토 씨! 우리가 새로운 마법소녀가 되어 함께 할께요!

1000608910.english: Huh... Is that so? Momo? Did you finally open your eyes?
1000608910.korean: 훗... 그런가? 모모? 드디어 눈을 떴나?

1000608911.english: Oh, yeah. Open your eyes. We'll fight together.
1000608911.korean: 그, 그래. 눈을 떴어. 우리도 함께 싸울게.

1000608912.english: As expected... my close friend... my soul-brother. Finally free from the magic of the Demon King Faucre. &n Look! Faucre! All your schemes have been shattered!
1000608912.korean: 역시... 내 친우... 나와 영혼을 나눈 자매. 드디어 뽀끄루 대마왕의 마력에서 벗어났구나.&n자! 봐라! 뽀끄루! 네 계략은 모두 파쇄되었다!

1000608913.english: He's already run away, Mr. Moonbit...

1000608914.english: Ugh... Cowardly... Anyway, nice to meet you. My name is Moonbit. I am the last survivor of the Moon Rabbit tribe and a magical girl. &n Your... That outfit... Hmm... It somehow resembles the traditional clothing of the Moon Rabbit tribe.
1000608914.korean: 큭... 비겁한... 어쨌든 반갑군. 내 이름은 백토. 문 래빗 족의 마지막 생존자이자 마법소녀다.&n넌... 그 복장은... 흐음... 어쩐지 문 래빗 족의 전통복과 닮았군.

1000608915.english: Yes? Yes! I've decided to become a magical girl too.
1000608915.korean: 네? 넷! 저도 마법소녀가 되기로 결심을 했답니다.

1000608916.english: The magic power isn't that noticeable... but the power of a magical girl is the power of the heart... &n The moon's blessings will be with those with strong hearts, so it's not a big deal.
1000608916.korean: 마력은 그리 느껴지지 않는데... 하지만 마법소녀의 힘은 마음의 힘... &n마음이 굳센 자에겐 달의 축복이 함께 할 테니 그건 큰 문제가 아니야.

1000608917.english: What is your true name as a magical girl?

1000608919.english: What should I do, Momo? I wasn't prepared for that...
1000608919.korean: 어떡하죠? 모모 씨? 그것까진 준비를 안 했는데...

1000608920.english: Her name is Magical Girl... no, Magical Girl Magical Leia. She is the third magical girl of the new era.
1000608920.korean: 그녀의 이름은 마법숙...아니 마법소녀 매지컬 레아야.&n새로운 시대의 세 번째 마법 소녀야.

1000608921.english: Is that so? Magical girls are being rebuilt... That's good news.
1000608921.korean: 그런가? 마법소녀가 재건되고 있다니... 기쁜 소식이군.

1000608922.english: So... what are you talking about? &n Moonbit, what are you going to do next?
1000608922.korean: 저... 그래서 말인데? &n백토, 넌 이다음은 어떻게 할 거야?

1000608923.english: Of course, we have to chase after the Demon King Faucre.

1000608924.english: Really? Then... wouldn't you like to pursue Faucre a little more effectively? Since there's a new secret base and commander...
1000608924.korean: 그래? 그럼 조금... 더 효과적으로 뽀끄루를 추격하지 않을래?&n새로 비밀 기지랑 사령관님이 생겨서...

1000608925.english: I don't know what you're talking about. &n In the past, the secret base was destroyed by Faucre, and the commander [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c] also went missing...
1000608925.korean: 무슨 말인지 모르겠군.&n과거 뽀끄루에게 비밀기지도 파괴되었고 사령관 [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]도 행방불명 됐는데...

1000608926.english: Hey, this time we rebuilt the secret base... and we have a new commander... &n It'll definitely help us in the pursuit.
1000608926.korean: 이, 이번에 비밀 기지도 재건했고... 새로운 사령관님도 오셨거든...&n분명히 추격에 도움이 될 거야.

1000608927.english: Oh! [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c] is back? &n How wonderful! This is not the time. Momo! Guide me! I want to meet the new [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c].
1000608927.korean: 오오! [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]이 부활한 건가?&n정말 반가운 일이군! 이럴 때가 아냐. 모모! 안내해라! 새로운 [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]을 만나고 싶군.

1000608929.english: I'll show you! Come this way! Hurry up!
1000608929.korean: 내가 안내해 줄게! 이쪽으로 와! 어서!

1000608930.english: Oh! It's over already? Leaving me out?
1000608930.korean: 오우! 벌써 끝나버린 거야? 나는 빼놓고?

1000608931.english: Seriously... why are you so late?

1000608932.english: I did that because I had some things to prepare.
1000608932.korean: 이것 저것 준비좀 할게 있어서 그랬지.

1000608935.english: Moonbit... Even though he's been alone for several years... he's so confident... and he's talking to his friend as if nothing happened.
1000608935.korean: 백토... 몇 년이나 혼자 보냈는데도... 저렇게 당당하다니...&n게다가 아무렇지도 않게 친구와 이야기하고 있어.

1000608940.english: Hey, Leia? When will Phantom be able to be close to his friends?
1000608940.korean: 저기, 레아? 팬텀은 언제쯤 친구들이랑 가깝게 지낼 수 있을까?

1000608941.english: Haha, this isn't something that can be solved by rushing like that.
1000608941.korean: 후후, 그렇게 서두른다고 해결될 일이 아닌걸요.

1000608942.english: Well, I think Leah is right.
1000608942.korean: 뭐, 그건 레아 말이 맞는 것 같아.

1000608945.english: Phew... I was hiding there and just waiting for Moonbit to leave.
1000608945.korean: 휴... 저곳에 숨어서 백토가 가기만 기다렸어요.

1000608946.english: I think you guys are capable of a somewhat rational conversation...
1000608946.korean: 아무래도 당신들은 좀 이성적인 대화가 가능할 것 같아서요...

1000608947.english: ... I think there are circumstances we don't know about.
1000608947.korean: ... 저희가 모르는 사정이 있는 것 같네요.

1000608948.english: ... Yes. More than that... I heard there's a commander... &n Could you please guide me to him?
1000608948.korean: ... 네. 그것보다... 사령관이 있다는 이야기를 들었는데...&n절 그분께 혹시 인도해 주실 수 있나요?

1000608949.english: Come to think of it... you were a Bioroid too...

1000608950.english: Yes, no problem. We'll guide you to the owner.
1000608950.korean: 네. 문제없어요. 저희가 주인님께 당신을 안내해 드릴게요.

1000608951.english: And if possible, please do it without Moonbit knowing...

1000608952.english: Haha. Of course. First of all... would you like to follow me?

1000608953.english: I think we need to talk quietly.
1000608953.korean: 아무래도 조용히 이야기를 좀 나누어야 할 것 같으니

1000608955.english: Huh? You... Commander [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c]... &n I finally get to meet you... I thought I would never see you again after humanity was destroyed.
1000608955.korean: 응? 당신이... 사령관 [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]...&n드디어 만나게 되었군... 인류가 멸망해 난 영원히 그대를 만나지 못할 줄 알았다.

1000608956.english: "Magic Gentleman?" What's that? I racked my brain and realized it was the title of a commander from a magical girl series.
1000608956.korean: - 매직 젠틀맨? 그게 뭐지? 나는 맹렬히 머리를 굴리다 그게 마법소녀 물에 나왔던&n사령관의 칭호라는 것을 깨달았다.

1000608957.english: I feel like I've been living for this day. [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c] &n Can you stand up for a moment? I'd like to say hello in the Moon Rabbit way.
1000608957.korean: 난, 이날을 위해 살아온 것 같다. [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c] &n잠깐 일어서줄 수 있나? 문 래빗의 방식으로 인사를 하고 싶은데?

1000608958.english: - This is a big deal. It can't happen now. We have to overcome this crisis.
1000608958.korean: - 큰일이다. 지금은 일어날 수 없는데. 이 위기를 넘겨야 한다.

1000608960.english: - Moonbit is coming. Wait... It's difficult to come this way...
1000608960.korean: - 백토는 다가오고 있다. 잠깐... 이쪽으로 오는 건 곤란한데...

1000608961.english: Why won't you wake up? [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c]? &n Surely... you don't want to perform the ritual with me?
1000608961.korean: 어째서 일어나지 않지? [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]?&n설마... 나와 의식을 치르고 싶지 않은 건가?

1000608964.english: Which student is hitting the sacred desk? The teacher will not forgive such a thing!
1000608964.korean: 어떤 학생이 신성한 책상을 치는 거죠?&n선생님은 그런 것! 용서 못 해요!

1000608965.english: Huh? Alexandra? Why are you there...

1000608966.english: That... Oh, yes. Something fell under the desk for a moment, so I went to pick it up. &n More than that... Huh?
1000608966.korean: 그... 아 네. 잠깐 책상 밑에 뭐가 좀 떨어져서 주우러 움직인 거예요.&n그것보다... 흐으응?

1000608968.english: ... Somehow... his face reminds me of Faucre's subordinate, Lilim.
1000608968.korean: ... 어쩐지... 뽀끄루 수하의 릴림이 생각나는 얼굴이군.

1000608969.english: White. No. This person is Alexandra, the training officer at this base, Orca... and one of the commanders.
1000608969.korean: 백토. 아니야. 이 분은 이곳 기지 오르카의 교육 담당이자... 지휘관 중 한 분인&n알렉산드라라는 분이야.

1000608970.english: Well... I guess I was a bit oversensitive.
1000608970.korean: 하긴... 내가 좀 예민했던 것 같군.

1000608971.english: Hehehe... That's interesting. Anyway, is this the appearance of a new student?
1000608971.korean: 후훗... 재미있군요. 어쨌든 새로운 학생 한 명의 등장인가요?

1000608972.english: I am the magical girl Moonbit, who will start fighting against evil from here on out. Please take good care of me.
1000608972.korean: 앞으로 이곳을 거점으로 악과 싸움을 시작할 마법소녀 백토다.&n잘 부탁하지.

1000608974.english: - The two exchanged a somewhat murderous look. &n Anyway, thanks to Alexandra's quick-witted gaze, Momo's suspicions seemed to have been dispelled.
1000608974.korean: - 두 사람은 어쩐지 살벌한 눈빛을 주고받았다.&n어쨌든 알렉산드라의 순발력 있는 눈빛 덕분에 모모의 의심은 넘긴 것 같다.

1000608978.english: More than that… Ms. Alexandra, under the desk…

1000608979.english: Oh my? It's already this late?

1000608980.english: I still have students to teach, so would you mind if I excused myself first, Master?
1000608980.korean: 저는 가르쳐야 할 학생들이 남아있어서, 먼저 실례해도 괜찮겠죠? 주인님?

1000608981.english: Hohoho... Okay, then... Everyone? I hope you have a fun and rewarding time...
1000608981.korean: 후후후... 자, 그럼... 모두들? 재미있고 유익한 시간을 보내시기를...

1000608982.english: - Clever Alexandra left without giving Momo a chance to ask her anything.
1000608982.korean: - 영리한 알렉산드라는 모모에게 어떤 것도 물을 틈을 주지 않고 떠났다.

1000608983.english: - …Alexandra's sweaty hand brushes my palm. &n A note…?! When did I write something like this?
1000608983.korean: - … 알렉산드라의 땀에 젖은 손이 내 손바닥을 스친다. &n쪽지…?! 이런 건 언제 써둔 걸까?

1000608984.english: Alexandra? A student? Are you teaching here? I doubt it… You look so much like Lilim?
1000608984.korean: 알렉산드라? 학생? 혹시 이곳에서 교육을 맡고 있나? &n의심스럽군… 릴림과 너무나도 많이 닮았단 말이야?

1000608985.english: Yeah… no. &n Alexandra is a really nice person… Moonbit.
1000608985.korean: 으응… 아니야. &n알렉산드라 님은 정말 좋은 분이야… 백토야.

1000608986.english: ...Yeah. I guess I was overthinking it.
1000608986.korean: ... 그래. 내가 지나치게 생각한 것 같군.

1000608987.english: Anyway, [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c]? I would like to formally greet you once again on behalf of the Moon Rabbit clan.
1000608987.korean: 아무튼, [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]? 다시 한번 문 래빗 일족을 대신하여 정식으로 인사하지.

1000608988.english: - When he said hello, I raised my hand without thinking. But Moonbit pushed his face toward me.
1000608988.korean: - 인사를 한다길래, 난 별생각 없이 손을 들었지만. 백토는 내게 얼굴을 들이밀었다.

1000608990.english: Kkeut... Magic Gentleman? Are you trying to embarrass me? &n Please... respond to the ritual.
1000608990.korean: 크읏… 매직 젠틀맨? 날 부끄럽게 만들 셈인가? &n부디… 의식에 응해다오.

1000608992.english: - While I was at a loss as to what to do, Momo lowered her voice and whispered.
1000608992.korean: - 내가 어찌해야 할지 감을 잡지 못하고 있는 사이, 모모가 목소리를 낮추고 속삭인다.

1000608993.english: Please... slightly touch your noses left and right... &n That is the ritual of Moonbit.
1000608993.korean: 코를... 살짝살짝 좌우로 마주쳐주세요...&n그게 백토의 의식이에요.

1000608994.english: - Momo shook her head vigorously, and only then did I begin to understand, even if only vaguely, what kind of consciousness Moonbit was talking about.
1000608994.korean: - 모모는 열심히 고개를 저었고, 그제서야 난 백토가 말하는 의식이 어떤 건지&n대충이나마 알게 됐다.

1000608995.english: Gentleman? You're going too far... &n ...Since it's come to this, I'll do it by force...

1000608996.english: - I put my nose to Moonbit's face.
1000608996.korean: - 난 백토의 얼굴에 코를 갖다 댔다.

1000608998.english: - In order to respect the culture of the Moon Rabbit Clan, I endured the embarrassment of bumping noses with a Bioroid I had never seen before.
1000608998.korean: - 난 문 래빗 일족의 문화를 존중하기 위해, 처음 보는 바이오로이드와 코를 부비는&n부끄러움을 감수했다.

1000608999.english: Hoot! As expected, [c][ffd130]Magic Gentleman[-][/c]!! I feel the aura of a strong warrior from you!
1000608999.korean: 훗! 역시 [c][ffd130]매직 젠틀맨[-][/c]!! 당신에게선 강인한 전사의 기운이 느껴지는군!

1000609001.english: - It seems like we've overcome the critical moment, but it's still too early to relax.
1000609001.korean: - 어떻게 급한 고비는 넘긴 것 같지만, 긴장을 풀기엔 아직 이르다.

1000609002.english: Okay, then. Magic Gentleman… My partner… And Momo's partner… &n Please tell me about your plans for the future. What should we do first?
1000609002.korean: 자, 그럼. 매직 젠틀맨… 내 짝… 그리고 모모의 짝… &n앞으로의 계획을 들려주길 바란다. 가장 먼저 해야 할 일들이 뭐지?

1000609003.english: A mission to magically defeat those hideous, noisy machines? I can handle that. Leave it to me.
1000609003.korean: 저 끔찍하고 요란스러운 기계들을 마법으로 물리치는 임무인가? &n그런 일이라면 얼마든지 해줄 수 있다. 내게 맡겨다오.

1000609004.english: Those monsters must have been summoned by the Faucre Demon King... &n If you destroy those monsters, you will be able to meet the Faucre Demon King.
1000609004.korean: 저 괴물들은 분명히 뽀끄루 대마왕이 불러온 것일 테고…&n저 괴물들을 부수다 보면, 뽀끄루 대마왕을 만날 수 있겠지.

1000609005.english: - Moonbit seemed full of enthusiasm, but I had no idea. &n ... Where and how should I start to match the rhythm?
1000609005.korean: - 백토는 의욕이 넘쳐 보였지만, 난 아무런 생각이 들지 않았다.&n... 어디서부터 어떻게 장단을 맞춰줘야 하지?

1000609007.english: I think it would be best to first obtain the Magical Songpyeon to be used in the Full Moon Night. &n If you have the Magical Songpyeon, you can use the Moon Rabbit Crystal Power.
1000609007.korean: 제 생각에는 우선 만월야에 쓰일 매지컬 송편을 구하는 게 좋을 것 같아요. &n매지컬 송편이 있다면 문 래빗 크리스탈 파워를 쓸 수 있을 테니까요.

1000609008.english: Hmm! You mean Magical Songpyeon? I hadn't thought of that. &n Yeah... If it's Magical Songpyeon, we can bring out our full strength.
1000609008.korean: 음! 매지컬 송편 말인가? 그 생각을 못 했군.&n그래… 매지컬 송편이라면 우리 힘을 최대로 끌어낼 수 있겠지.

1000609009.english: We don't have time to do this, let's hurry, Momo.
1000609009.korean: 이러고 있을 시간이 없어, 서두르자 모모.
